project.name: Aspid.MVVM
project.description: High-performance Source-Generator-based MVVM framework for Unity: clean View/ViewModel/business-logic separation, zero-reflection bindings, minimal allocations.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: Release pipeline triggered by pushing a v* tag or manual dispatch; validates the SemVer version against package.json and CHANGELOG, builds and tests the Roslyn generators/analyzer, verifies committed generator DLLs match a fresh build, then splits the Unity package subtree to the upm/upm-preview branch, creates an immutable upm/<version> tag, and publishes a GitHub release.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-job GitHub Actions workflow that routes stable vs pre-release SemVer versions to different UPM branches and uses git subtree split to publish a UPM-consumable package.

nodes.id: step:.github/workflows/release.yml:Verify committed generator DLLs match the freshly-built ones
nodes.name: Verify committed generator DLLs
nodes.summary: Guard step that rebuilds the three generator/analyzer DLLs and aborts the release if the committed binaries under the Unity package differ from the freshly-built output, enforcing the 'commit refreshed DLLs' invariant.

nodes.name: Publish UPM subtree
nodes.summary: Publishing step that runs git subtree split on the Unity package path and force-pushes the result to the target upm/upm-preview branch, then creates and pushes the immutable upm/<version> tag for package pinning.

nodes.name: Build Roslyn generators and analyzer
nodes.summary: Builds the source generator, analyzer, and Unity generator solutions in Release configuration with the pinned .NET 9.0 SDK before tests and DLL verification.

nodes.name: claude.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that invokes the Anthropic claude-code-action whenever an issue, PR review, or comment mentions @claude, granting Claude read access to repo contents, PRs, issues, and CI results to respond to maintainers.

nodes.name: claude-code-review.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs an automated Claude code review on every pull request open, synchronize, ready-for-review, and reopen event using the code-review plugin from the claude-code marketplace.

nodes.name: pr-ready-labels.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that swaps PR status labels via github-script: marks a PR 'status: needs-review' when readied and 'status: work-in-progress' when converted back to draft.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Keep-a-Changelog style release history for the Aspid.MVVM UPM package, covering an Unreleased section (ViewModel/generator, Views, editor, debug panel, binders, collections, integrations) plus released versions 1.0.0 through 1.0.5.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.ru.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language translation of the Aspid.MVVM changelog, mirroring the English version's structure with Unreleased and 1.0.0-1.0.5 release sections.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian localization (.ru.md) kept structurally in sync with CHANGELOG.md heading-for-heading.

nodes.name: LICENSE.md
nodes.summary: MIT License text for the Aspid.MVVM package, copyright 2025 Vladislav Panin.

nodes.name: MIGRATION.md
nodes.summary: Migration guide for upgrading Aspid.MVVM, documenting compilation breakers (renamed StarterKit binders, removed attributes), runtime/behavioural changes (MonoView no longer abstract, Dispose/DestroyView semantics, ViewInitializer overhaul), infrastructure changes, and an upgrade checklist.

nodes.name: MIGRATION.ru.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language translation of the Aspid.MVVM migration guide, mirroring the English version's sections on compilation breakers, runtime/behavioural changes, infrastructure, and the upgrade checklist.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian localization (.ru.md) kept structurally in sync with MIGRATION.md heading-for-heading.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Unity UPM package manifest for tech.aspid.mvvm v1.1.0, declaring the display name, MIT license, minimum Unity version (6000.0), documentation/changelog/license URLs, keywords, author, and four importable samples (HelloWorld, Stats, TodoList, VirtualizedList).
nodes.languageNotes: Unity Package Manager manifest; the samples array declares importable sample packages exposed in the Package Manager UI.

nodes.name: 01-getting-started.md
nodes.summary: Getting-started guide (Russian) covering requirements, installation from Asset Store or source, a recommended learning path, and a step-by-step first Counter example (ViewModel, View, Bootstrap, Inspector setup).

nodes.name: 02-architecture.md
nodes.summary: Architecture reference explaining the MVVM pattern in Unity, what the source generator emits for ViewModels and Views, the binding pipeline (View requests BindableMember, ViewModel returns IBinderAdder, binder registers, data updates), and reverse binding.

nodes.name: 03-binding-modes.md
nodes.summary: Reference for the four BindMode values (OneWay, TwoWay, OneTime, OneWayToSource), automatic mode inference, explicit mode selection via [Bind] parameters or shortcut attributes, and Inspector mode restrictions.

nodes.name: 04-viewmodels.md
nodes.summary: ViewModel guide covering the three ViewModel variants, the [Bind], [BindAlso], [BindId], and [Access] attributes, change handlers, MonoViewModel and ScriptableViewModel base classes, and NotifyAll.

nodes.name: 05-views.md
nodes.summary: View guide describing how to declare binders (fields, properties, [AsBinder]), the [BindId] and [IgnoreBind] attributes, the View lifecycle and call order, IView<T>, EventMonoView, Instantiate, and initialization/deinitialization patterns.

nodes.name: 06-binders.md
nodes.summary: Binder reference covering the class hierarchy (Binder, MonoBinder, ComponentMonoBinder, TargetBinder), the IBinder<T>/IReverseBinder<T> interfaces, creating custom binders with worked examples, [BindModeOverride], and DebugLogBinder.

nodes.name: 07-commands.md
nodes.summary: Commands guide covering IRelayCommand, the [RelayCommand] attribute, the three CanExecute forms, parameterized commands, manual command creation, RelayCommand.Empty, and the link to ButtonCommandBinder.

nodes.name: 08-converters.md
nodes.summary: Converters guide describing IConverter<TFrom, TTo>, built-in string/boolean/arithmetic/functional converters, converter chaining, building custom converters, and Inspector/code usage.

nodes.name: 09-collections.md
nodes.summary: Observable collections guide covering NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs<T>, ObservableList/Dictionary/HashSet, FilteredList, ObservableListSync for Model-to-ViewModel synchronization, and binding collections to Views.

nodes.name: 10-dynamic-viewmodel.md
nodes.summary: DynamicViewModel guide covering EmptyViewModel, dynamic property types, constructing a DynamicViewModel via dictionary, implicit conversion, or Create factory methods, updating values, and comparison with generated ViewModels.

nodes.name: 11-view-initializers.md
nodes.summary: ViewInitializer guide explaining the InitializeStage options (Awake, OnEnable/OnDisable, Manual, DiConstructor), ViewInitializerManual, InitializeComponent and ViewModelInitializeComponent, and Inspector setup steps.

nodes.name: 12-di-integration.md
nodes.summary: Dependency-injection integration guide showing Zenject and VContainer setup (compilation symbols, container registration, ViewInitializer configuration), the DiConstructor stage, and manual initialization without DI.

nodes.name: 13-analyzers.md
nodes.summary: Roslyn analyzers guide listing the ViewModel and View diagnostics and available code fixes, plus how to install and configure (suppress) specific diagnostics.

nodes.name: 14-best-practices.md
nodes.summary: Best-practices guide covering project structure, ViewModel hygiene, binding mode selection, command patterns, collection usage, performance tips, common mistakes, and testing strategies.

nodes.name: Readme.md
nodes.summary: Project introduction (English) presenting Aspid.MVVM's key features (data binding, ViewModel, commands, observable collections, StarterKit, debugging, performance, extensibility, cross-platform), target audience, donation links, and getting-started pointers.

nodes.name: SUMMARY.md
nodes.summary: Documentation table of contents (GitBook SUMMARY) linking the basics, key concepts, advanced features, StarterKit components, and tutorials sections of the Aspid.MVVM docs.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: StarterKit overview and index page cataloguing every ready-to-use binder grouped by Unity component (Text, Image, Slider, Animator, AudioSource, Collections, etc.), with data types, supported BindModes, and links to per-category reference pages.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian-language documentation; uses markdown tables to enumerate binders, data types, and BindMode support per Unity component category.

nodes.name: animator-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for Animator binders (AnimatorSetBool/Float/Int/Trigger) that map ViewModel fields onto Animator parameters, including the OneWayToSource reverse-binding principle.

nodes.name: audio-source-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for AudioSource binders covering float properties (volume, pitch, distance), the AudioClip binder, switcher variants, and the AudioSourceToSourceMonoBinder.

nodes.name: button-command-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for ButtonCommandBinder, explaining how IRelayCommand is wired to Button.onClick, InteractableMode behaviour, and parameterized command variants.

nodes.name: canvas-group-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for CanvasGroup binders (alpha, interactable, blocksRaycasts, ignoreParentGroups) with Inspector property details and a managed-panel example.

nodes.name: caster-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for caster binders (AnyToStringCasterBinder, GenericToStringCasterBinder<T>, StringToBoolCasterBinder) that convert values between binder types in a binding chain.

nodes.name: collection-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for collection binders (ViewModelObservableListBinder, ViewModelCollectionBinder<T>, VirtualizedListItemSourceBinder) plus View factories/pools and collection filtering/sorting via ICollectionFilter<T> and ICollectionComparer<T>.

nodes.name: collider-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for Collider binders covering shared properties and shape-specific binders for Box, Capsule, Sphere, and Mesh colliders, with supported BindModes.

nodes.name: debug-binder.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for DebugLogBinder, a diagnostic binder that writes a ViewModel value to Debug.Log on each change, with guidance on when to use it.

nodes.name: dropdown-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for TMP_Dropdown binders covering selected value, options list, alpha fade speed, their switcher variants, the command binder, and the to-source mono binder.

nodes.name: gameobject-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for GameObject binders (Visible/SetActive with inversion, Tag, Tag switcher, and the by-bind mono binder) with show/hide panel examples.

nodes.name: generic-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for generic binders (GenericOneWay/TwoWay/OneWayToSource/OneTime<T>, GenericCasterBinder<TFrom,TTo>) used to bind arbitrary types without a dedicated binder, with usage guidance.

nodes.name: graphic-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for Graphic (UI) and Renderer (3D) binders covering color, color-component, and material binders plus their switcher variants.

nodes.name: image-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for UnityEngine.UI.Image binders covering sprite and fillAmount binders with their switcher variants and Inspector properties.

nodes.name: input-field-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for TMP_InputField binders covering the text InputFieldBinder with cycle protection and numeric modes, plus additional validation/content-type binders.

nodes.name: misc-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for miscellaneous binders (ObjectNameBinder, ComponentToSourceMonoBinder<T> with ready-made specializations, ByBindMonoBinder).

nodes.name: slider-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for UnityEngine.UI.Slider binders covering SliderValueBinder (with cycle protection), min/max binders and switchers, the command binder, and the to-source mono binder.

nodes.name: switcher-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page explaining the SwitcherBinder<T> pattern that selects between two values from a bool, lists ready-made switcher binders and SwitcherMonoBinder, and contrasts switchers with converters.

nodes.name: text-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for TMP_Text binders (TextBinder, font, font-size, alignment) and their switcher variants, with a statistics-display example.

nodes.name: toggle-binders.md
nodes.summary: Reference page for UnityEngine.UI.Toggle binders covering ToggleIsOnBinder (with cycle protection and inversion) and ToggleCommandBinder with InteractableMode and parameterized variants.

nodes.name: transform-binders.md
nodes.summary: Russian StarterKit reference for Transform and RectTransform binders, documenting position, rotation, euler-angles, and scale binders plus their bool-driven Switcher variants and supported bind modes.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian-language docs; describes binders that constrain BindMode (TwoWay forbidden, OneWay/OneTime/OneWayToSource allowed).

nodes.name: unity-event-binders.md
nodes.summary: Russian StarterKit reference for UnityEvent binders that relay ViewModel values into typed UnityEvent<T> invocations, covering the typed binder table and special bind/unbind, switcher, and number-condition variants.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian-language docs; UnityEvent binders support OneWay and OneTime modes and integrate with the Inspector for codeless event wiring.

nodes.name: value-binders.md
nodes.summary: Russian StarterKit reference for non-MonoBehaviour Value binders (OneWayValue, TwoWayValue, OneTimeValue, OneWayToSourceValue) used to read or push ViewModel values programmatically in code.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian-language docs; shows generic value wrappers with implicit cast to T?, Changed events, and FindBindableMember usage in custom components.

nodes.name: view-factories.md
nodes.summary: Russian StarterKit reference for View factories (IViewFactory<T>, PrefabViewFactory, pooled PrefabViewPool) that instantiate and release prefab-based Views for collection binders.
nodes.languageNotes: Russian-language docs; contrasts Instantiate/Destroy factory with ObjectPool-backed pool for allocation-free list item reuse.

nodes.name: counter.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language Counter tutorial: a step-by-step minimal example building a counter ViewModel with [OneWayBind] and [RelayCommand], explaining what the Source Generator emits and the View/Bootstrap/scene wiring.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; teaches the generated SetCount setter pattern and MonoBinder vs MonoBinder[] field naming.

nodes.name: greeter.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language Greeter tutorial introducing two-way binding ([TwoWayBind]) and partial void On*Changed hooks, contrasting TwoWay vs OneWay so an InputField updates a greeting in real time.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; assumes prior knowledge of the Counter tutorial.

nodes.name: hello-world.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language Hello World tutorial walking through Model, ViewModel, View and Bootstrap layers of the minimal sample, including the alternative Moment pattern and the MVVM lifecycle.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; explains generated members and the bind lifecycle for the simplest sample.

nodes.name: stats.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language Stats tutorial covering advanced IRelayCommand usage: three CanExecute approaches (property/method/parameterized), NotifyCanExecuteChanged, View inheritance, and InteractableMode.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; the most command-focused tutorial, demonstrating CanExecute wiring and InteractableMode on button binders.

nodes.name: todo-item.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language TodoItem tutorial introducing a dedicated Model, IDisposable cleanup, and bidirectional IsCompleted synchronization across multiple binding types on one screen.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; assumes prior knowledge of Greeter ([TwoWayBind], On*Changed).

nodes.name: todo-list.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language TodoList tutorial composing TodoItemViewModel, TodoStorageViewModel and EditTextDialogViewModel with ObservableList, CreateSync, collection binders, view factories and dialogs.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; the largest tutorial, covering ObservableList/CreateSync and multi-ViewModel composition.

nodes.name: virtualized-list.md
nodes.summary: Russian-language VirtualizedList tutorial covering ItemViewModel/ListViewModel, FilteredList, IViewModelCollectionFilter/Comparer and PrefabViewPool-backed virtualization of large lists.
nodes.languageNotes: Content is in Russian; focuses on filtering, comparison and view pooling for large collections.

nodes.name: OneTimeBindableMember.cs

nodes.name: TwoWayBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Reference-type two-way bindable member supporting every BindMode except None, dispatching forward updates to binders and reverse updates from reverse binders while exposing a get/set Value and Changed event.

nodes.name: OneTimeEnumBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Sealed enum specialization of OneTimeStructBindableMember fixing the boxed type to Enum, exposed as a per-type singleton for one-time enum bindings.

nodes.name: OneWayEnumBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Sealed enum specialization of OneWayStructBindableMember fixing the boxed type to Enum, letting enum-typed binders receive the boxed enum value alongside the strongly-typed value.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceEnumBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Sealed enum specialization of OneWayToSourceStructBindableMember fixing the boxed type to Enum, forwarding View-side enum changes back to the ViewModel.

nodes.name: TwoWayEnumBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Sealed enum specialization of TwoWayStructBindableMember fixing the boxed type to Enum, supporting both strongly-typed and boxed-enum binders for two-way bindings.

nodes.name: IBinderRemover.cs
nodes.summary: Interface exposing a single Remove method to detach a previously attached binder from a bindable member.

nodes.name: IReadOnlyBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Covariant interface for a read-only bindable member that exposes a value and a Changed event, extending IReadOnlyValueBindableMember.

nodes.name: IReadOnlyValueBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Covariant interface exposing a read-only value and the ability to add binders, sitting between IBinderAdder and the higher-level bindable member contracts.

nodes.name: OneTimeStructBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract struct-valued one-time bindable member plus a ValueType-fixed singleton specialization, pushing a single boxed-or-typed value to a binder and releasing it.
nodes.languageNotes: Generic over <T : struct, TBoxed> with TBoxed as the boxing target, enabling allocation-aware boxing for struct payloads.

nodes.name: OneWayStructBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract struct-valued one-way bindable member plus a ValueType-fixed specialization, dispatching value changes to both strongly-typed and boxed binders via separate Changed events.
nodes.languageNotes: Generic over <T : struct, TBoxed> with a private BoxedChanged event to feed IBinder<TBoxed> subscribers the pre-boxed value.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceStructBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Bindable member for value-type properties in OneWayToSource mode, pushing View changes back to the ViewModel via a setter delegate while rejecting non-TwoWay binders.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceStructBindableMember
nodes.summary: OneWayToSource bindable member for struct values; registers reverse binders, validates their mode, and forwards View-side changes to the ViewModel setter delegate.

nodes.name: TwoWayStructBindableMember.cs
nodes.summary: Bindable member for value-type properties in TwoWay mode, dispatching ViewModel values to binders and propagating View changes back through a setter delegate.
nodes.languageNotes: Handles specific, struct (boxed) and any-binder casts; throws BinderInvalidCastException / ReverseBinderInvalidCastException on mismatch.

nodes.name: TwoWayStructBindableMember
nodes.summary: TwoWay bindable member for struct values; wires both forward (ViewModel to View) and reverse (View to ViewModel) flows, dispatching on binder mode and type.

nodes.name: Binder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all binders, implementing the bind/unbind lifecycle with state guards and overridable hook methods (OnBinding, OnBound, OnUnbinding, OnUnbound).

nodes.name: Binder.Debug.cs

nodes.name: RebindableBinderExtensions.cs

nodes.name: IRebindableBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Editor/Debug-only interface declaring Rebind(), allowing a binder to re-establish its connection to the current ViewModel.

nodes.name: BinderExtensions.Bind.cs
nodes.summary: Provides BindSafely extension overloads that bind single binders, arrays, lists, and spans while logging and throwing a descriptive exception on null entries.
nodes.languageNotes: Overload set across collection shapes (T[], List<T>, ReadOnlySpan<T>) with profiling markers (Markers<T>.BindSafelyMarker).

nodes.name: BinderExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class with BindSafely overloads and null-message builders for guarded binding of single or multiple binders.

nodes.name: BinderExtensions.Unbind.cs
nodes.summary: Provides UnbindSafely extension overloads that unbind single binders or collections, logging and throwing a descriptive exception on null entries.

nodes.name: BinderExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class (partial) with UnbindSafely overloads and a null-message builder for guarded unbinding of single or multiple binders.

nodes.name: BinderLogAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Attribute instructing the Source Generator to emit a logging-wrapped SetValue implementation for an IBinder<T>; stripped outside UNITY_EDITOR builds.

nodes.name: BinderLogAttribute
nodes.summary: Conditional, method-targeted attribute that marks a binder SetValue method for source-generated logging.

nodes.name: IAnyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Interface extending IBinder with a generic SetValue<T> so a binder can receive a value of any type from the ViewModel.

nodes.name: IAnyBinder
nodes.summary: IBinder extension declaring a generic SetValue<T> for receiving arbitrary-typed values from the ViewModel.

nodes.name: IAnyReverseBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Interface extending IBinder with reverse binding for non-generic object values, defaulting Mode to TwoWay; type safety is deferred to runtime.

nodes.name: IAnyReverseBinder
nodes.summary: IBinder extension with an object-typed ValueChanged event for propagating View changes back to the ViewModel, defaulting to TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: IBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Core binder contracts: IBinder defines the bind/unbind lifecycle and Mode, while IBinder<in T> adds a typed SetValue for receiving ViewModel values.

nodes.name: IBinder
nodes.summary: Base binder interface declaring Bind(IBinderAdder), Unbind(), and a default OneWay Mode; the generic IBinder<in T> adds typed SetValue.

nodes.name: TargetBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract Binder subclass holding a serialized typed Target reference for derived binders to operate on.

nodes.name: TargetBinder
nodes.summary: Generic abstract binder that extends Binder, exposing a serialized non-null Target<TTarget> to subclasses.

nodes.name: ViewBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Binder that initializes/deinitializes a nested IView with the ViewModel it receives, enabling composition of sub-views.

nodes.name: ViewBinder
nodes.summary: Binder that receives a ViewModel via SetValue and (de)initializes a wrapped IView accordingly, deinitializing on unbind.

nodes.name: IReverseBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Interface extending IBinder with typed reverse binding via a ValueChanged<T> event, defaulting Mode to TwoWay.

nodes.name: IReverseBinder
nodes.summary: Generic IBinder extension with a typed ValueChanged<T> event propagating View changes back to the ViewModel, defaulting to TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions.Action.cs
nodes.summary: Factory extension methods that build RelayCommand instances (and empty/empty-execution fallbacks) from Action delegates across 0–4 parameter arities.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of generic arity overloads (T, T1..T4) and nullable type parameters for command parameters.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class with CreateCommand / CreateCommandOrEmpty(Execution) factories converting Action delegates into RelayCommand instances.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods returning a command itself or a shared Empty/EmptyExecution fallback when the command is null, across 0–4 parameter arities.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class with GetSelfOrEmpty / GetSelfOrEmptyExecution helpers that substitute a shared empty RelayCommand for null commands.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions.WithoutParameters.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods that adapt parameterized RelayCommands into parameterless RelayCommands by capturing fixed argument values.

nodes.name: RelayCommandExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class converting 1–4 parameter RelayCommands into parameterless commands by binding captured argument values to Execute/CanExecute.

nodes.name: IRelayCommand.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the IRelayCommand interface family (0–4 parameters) with CanExecute, Execute, and NotifyCanExecuteChanged members.

nodes.name: IRelayCommand
nodes.summary: Parameterless relay command interface declaring CanExecute, Execute, and NotifyCanExecuteChanged; generic arities add parameter overloads.

nodes.name: RelayCommand.cs
nodes.summary: Concrete IRelayCommand implementations for 0–4 parameters, wrapping execute/canExecute delegates with shared Empty/EmptyExecution singletons.
nodes.languageNotes: Five generic-arity classes share a structure: cached Empty/EmptyExecution statics, delegate fields, and CanExecuteChanged event.

nodes.name: RelayCommand
nodes.summary: Parameterless RelayCommand implementing IRelayCommand via execute/canExecute delegates, with shared Empty and EmptyExecution instances.

nodes.name: BinderInvalidCastException.cs
nodes.summary: Exception (with Class/Struct factory helpers) thrown when a binder cannot be cast to the expected IBinder<T> or IAnyBinder contract.

nodes.name: BinderInvalidCastException
nodes.summary: InvalidCastException subtype with static Class<T> and Struct<T,TBoxed> builders that compose descriptive binder cast-failure messages.

nodes.name: BindSafelyNullReferenceException.cs
nodes.summary: NullReferenceException subtype thrown by BindSafely when a binder in the collection is null.

nodes.name: BinderExceptionExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension that enriches a binder-related exception message with the binder's component type and Unity hierarchy path.

nodes.name: AddExceptionMessage
nodes.summary: Appends the binder's component type and GameObject hierarchy path to an exception message for clearer diagnostics.

nodes.name: ReverseBinderInvalidCastException.cs
nodes.summary: Generic exception (with Class/Struct factory helpers) thrown when a binder cannot be cast to the expected IReverseBinder<T> contract.

nodes.name: ReverseBinderInvalidCastException
nodes.summary: Generic InvalidCastException subtype with Class and Struct<TBoxed> builders producing descriptive reverse-binder cast-failure messages.

nodes.name: UnbindSafelyNullReferenceException.cs
nodes.summary: NullReferenceException subtype thrown by UnbindSafely when a binder in the collection is null.

nodes.name: BindIdAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [BindId] attribute that overrides the auto-derived binding identifier of a bindable member for the source generator.

nodes.name: BindIdAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute carrying an explicit binding id string, consumed by the source generator to name a bindable member's binding key.

nodes.name: IgnoreBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [IgnoreBind] marker attribute that excludes a member from binding code generation.

nodes.name: IgnoreBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Marker attribute telling the source generator to skip a member when emitting binding code.

nodes.name: LoggerHelper.cs
nodes.summary: Internal helper that formats diagnostic log messages with color-coded prefixes for classes, structs, interfaces and paths used in framework logging.

nodes.name: LoggerHelper
nodes.summary: Static helper providing GetMessage / GetClassMessage / GetStructMessage / GetInterfaceMessage extension-style formatters that wrap messages with rich-text color tags.

nodes.name: BindMode.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the BindMode enum (None, OneWay, TwoWay, OneTime, OneWayToSource) describing the direction of data flow between ViewModel and View.
nodes.languageNotes: Core binding-direction enum referenced throughout the binder and generation layers.

nodes.name: BindModeExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods classifying a BindMode value as one-way (IsOne), two-way (IsTwo), or none (IsNone) for concise binding-direction checks.

nodes.name: BindModeExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class exposing IsOne/IsTwo/IsNone predicates over BindMode for binding-direction classification.

nodes.name: BindModeExtensions.Throw.cs
nodes.summary: Partial BindModeExtensions class adding guard methods that throw when a BindMode does (or does not) match an expected one-way/two-way/none category.
nodes.languageNotes: Partial class splitting validation/throw helpers from the predicate extensions in BindModeExtensions.cs.

nodes.name: BindModeExtensions
nodes.summary: Guard-clause extensions (ThrowExceptionIfOne/NotOne/Two/NotTwo/Matches/NotMatches/None) that validate BindMode arguments and raise InvalidOperationException/ArgumentException with formatted messages.

nodes.name: BindModeAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [BindMode] validation attribute that constrains which binding modes are permitted on a bindable member, exposing IsAll/IsOne/IsTwo flags and the allowed Modes set.

nodes.name: BindModeAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute declaring the set of valid BindMode values for a member, used by the analyzer/generator to validate binding-mode usage.

nodes.name: BindModeOverrideAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [BindModeOverride] attribute that overrides the permitted binding modes for a member, mirroring BindModeAttribute's IsAll/IsOne/IsTwo/Modes surface.

nodes.name: BindModeOverrideAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute overriding the allowed BindMode set for a member, complementing BindModeAttribute in binding-mode validation.

nodes.name: ViewModelExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods that dispose an IViewModel (and disposable variants) with profiling markers, centralizing ViewModel teardown logic.

nodes.name: ViewModelExtensions
nodes.summary: Static class with DisposeViewModel overloads that wrap IViewModel/IDisposable teardown in profiler markers.

nodes.name: FindBindableMemberParameters.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the FindBindableMemberParameters readonly ref struct carrying the id used to look up a bindable member on a ViewModel.
nodes.languageNotes: Readonly ref struct used as an allocation-free parameter bag for IViewModel.FindBindableMember.

nodes.name: FindBindableMemberResult.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the FindBindableMemberResult readonly struct returned by bindable-member lookups, exposing IsFound and the resolved IBinderAdder.

nodes.name: Access.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the Access enum (Private/Protected/Public) whose values mirror Roslyn SyntaxKind codes to control the visibility of generated bindable properties.

nodes.name: AccessAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [Access] attribute that sets the getter/setter access modifiers of a property generated from a bindable field.

nodes.name: AccessAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute carrying Get/Set Access values that the generator applies to the generated property's accessors.

nodes.name: BaseBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract base attribute shared by the bind-attribute family (Bind, OneWayBind, TwoWayBind, OneTimeBind, OneWayToSourceBind).

nodes.name: BaseBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Common abstract base for all bind attributes, giving the generator a single type to match bindable members against.

nodes.name: BindAlsoAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [BindAlso] attribute declaring an additional property name that should raise change notifications alongside a bindable member.

nodes.name: BindAlsoAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute holding a dependent property name so the generator emits cascading change notifications.

nodes.name: BindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the core [Bind] attribute that marks a field for bindable-property generation, optionally specifying a BindMode.

nodes.name: BindAttribute
nodes.summary: Primary bind attribute (parameterless and BindMode-taking constructors) that the source generator scans to emit bindable properties.

nodes.name: OneTimeBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [OneTimeBind] attribute, a BindAttribute specialization fixing the binding to OneTime mode.

nodes.name: OneTimeBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Shorthand bind attribute that pins the generated binding to BindMode.OneTime.

nodes.name: OneWayBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [OneWayBind] attribute, a BindAttribute specialization fixing the binding to OneWay mode.

nodes.name: OneWayBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Shorthand bind attribute that pins the generated binding to BindMode.OneWay.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [OneWayToSourceBind] attribute, a BindAttribute specialization fixing the binding to OneWayToSource mode.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Shorthand bind attribute that pins the generated binding to BindMode.OneWayToSource.

nodes.name: RelayCommandAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [RelayCommand] attribute that turns a method into a generated IRelayCommand property, with an optional CanExecute predicate name.

nodes.name: RelayCommandAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute exposing a CanExecute property name that the generator uses to emit an IRelayCommand from a decorated method.

nodes.name: TwoWayBindAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [TwoWayBind] attribute, a BindAttribute specialization fixing the binding to TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: TwoWayBindAttribute
nodes.summary: Shorthand bind attribute that pins the generated binding to BindMode.TwoWay.

nodes.name: ViewModelAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [ViewModel] attribute that marks a partial class for IViewModel implementation generation.

nodes.name: ViewModelAttribute
nodes.summary: Marker attribute that triggers generation of the IViewModel implementation on a decorated partial class.

nodes.name: IViewModel.cs
nodes.summary: Core IViewModel interface declaring FindBindableMember, the contract the source generator implements for every [ViewModel] class.

nodes.name: IViewModel
nodes.summary: Interface defining FindBindableMember(in FindBindableMemberParameters) which resolves a binder adder for a requested bindable member.

nodes.name: ViewExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods for IView lifecycle management: reinitializing with a new ViewModel, deinitializing, and disposing with profiler markers.

nodes.name: ViewExtensions
nodes.summary: Static class with Reinitialize/DeinitializeView/DisposeView helpers that drive the View's bind/unbind/dispose lifecycle around a ViewModel.

nodes.name: AsBinderAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [AsBinder] attribute that directs the source generator to wire a View field/property to a specific IBinder type with optional constructor arguments.
nodes.languageNotes: The captured Type field is compiled in only under UNITY_EDITOR || DEBUG to keep release builds lean.

nodes.name: AsBinderAttribute
nodes.summary: Sealed attribute carrying the IBinder type (editor/debug only) and constructor arguments used by the generator to emit View binding code.

nodes.name: ViewAttribute.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the [View] attribute that marks a partial class for View source generation, with an AutoBinderFields toggle controlling automatic binder field discovery.

nodes.name: ViewAttribute
nodes.summary: Attribute applied to a partial class to trigger View code generation; AutoBinderFields controls whether binder fields are auto-detected.

nodes.name: IView.cs
nodes.summary: Declares the core IView interface (and strongly-typed IView<T>) for initializing and deinitializing a View against an IViewModel.

nodes.name: IView
nodes.summary: Interface contract for a View: exposes the bound ViewModel and Initialize/Deinitialize lifecycle methods, plus a generic IView<T> variant for strongly-typed ViewModels.

nodes.name: Aspid.MVVM.StarterKit.asmdef
nodes.summary: Unity assembly definition for the StarterKit runtime module, declaring its assembly name and references to the core MVVM and dependency assemblies.
nodes.languageNotes: Unity .asmdef files scope C# compilation into separate assemblies and declare inter-assembly references.

nodes.name: AnyToStringCasterBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Caster binder that converts an arbitrary object value to a string (via GenericToString or a custom converter) before forwarding it to a string setter.

nodes.name: AnyToStringCasterBinder
nodes.summary: Wraps a string-producing setter and an object-to-string converter, applying conversion in SetValue; rejects TwoWay binding mode.

nodes.name: GenericToStringCasterBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic caster binder converting a value of type T to its string representation using an optional format, then forwarding to a string setter.

nodes.name: GenericToStringCasterBinder
nodes.summary: Holds a setter and a GenericToString<T> converter (or custom converter), converting bound T values to strings in SetValue; rejects TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: StringToBoolCasterBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Caster binder mapping a bound string to a bool (empty/non-empty, optionally inverted) before forwarding to a bool setter.

nodes.name: StringToBoolCasterBinder
nodes.summary: Uses a StringEmptyToBoolConverter (with optional inversion) to translate bound strings into bool values in SetValue; rejects TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: CollectionBinderBase.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract base binder that subscribes to an observable collection's change notifications and dispatches add/remove/replace/move/reset events to overridable hooks.

nodes.name: CollectionBinderBase
nodes.summary: Manages subscription/unsubscription to a bound collection and translates NotifyCollectionChanged events into OnAdded/OnRemoved/OnReplace/OnMove/OnReset template methods, with disposal cleanup.

nodes.name: ObservableDictionaryBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Binder that observes an observable dictionary and reacts to key/value add, remove, replace, and reset changes by initializing or deinitializing dictionary state.

nodes.name: ObservableDictionaryBinder
nodes.summary: Subscribes to an observable dictionary's change events and routes them through OnAdded/OnRemoved/OnReplace/OnReset hooks while managing initialize/deinitialize lifecycle.

nodes.name: ObservableListBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Binder that observes an observable list (with optional filtering) and propagates indexed add/remove/replace/move/reset changes through overridable hooks.

nodes.name: ObservableListBinder
nodes.summary: Accepts list-like bound values, optionally applies a filter via GetFilterList, and dispatches indexed collection-change events to OnAdded/OnRemoved/OnReplace/OnMove/OnReset hooks with init/deinit management.

nodes.name: GenericCasterBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic one-way caster binder that converts a bound value via an IConverter before delegating to a setter, in both target-less and target-bound variants.

nodes.name: GenericCasterBinder
nodes.summary: Stores a setter and converter, applying conversion in SetValue; defined as both a standalone generic binder and a target-bound generic binder overload (rejects TwoWay mode).

nodes.name: GenericOneTimeBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic OneTime binder that applies a bound value to a setter a single time, in target-less and target-bound variants.

nodes.name: GenericOneTimeBinder
nodes.summary: Lightweight binder wrapping a setter for OneTime binding semantics, with a plain and a target-bound constructor overload.

nodes.name: GenericOneWayBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic OneWay binder that pushes bound ViewModel values into a setter delegate, in target-less and target-bound variants.

nodes.name: GenericOneWayBinder
nodes.summary: Invokes a stored setter delegate on each SetValue call for OneWay binding; provided in a standalone and a target-bound overload (rejects TwoWay mode).

nodes.name: GenericOneWayToSourceBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic OneWayToSource binder that pushes View-side value changes back to the ViewModel via a ValueChanged event, with bound/unbound callbacks and target-bound variants.

nodes.name: GenericOneWayToSourceBinder
nodes.summary: Raises a ValueChanged event to send View values back to the ViewModel, running optional initialize and bound/unbound callbacks on OnBound/OnUnbinding; defined as standalone and target-bound generic variants.

nodes.name: GenericTwoWayBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Generic TwoWay binder combining a setter for incoming ViewModel values and a ValueChanged event for outgoing View changes, with bound/unbound callbacks and target-bound variants.

nodes.name: GenericTwoWayBinder
nodes.summary: Bidirectional binder that applies ViewModel values via a setter and propagates View changes via ValueChanged, running initialize and bound/unbound callbacks; defined as standalone and target-bound generic variants.

nodes.name: INumberBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Composite binder interface that accepts numeric View values across int, long, float, and double via overloaded SetValue methods bridged to a common implementation.

nodes.name: INumberBinder
nodes.summary: Interface exposing SetValue overloads for all numeric types, with default implementations forwarding between numeric widths so a single binder can accept any numeric ViewModel value.

nodes.name: INumberReverseBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Composite reverse-binder interface that propagates numeric View values back to the ViewModel across int, long, float, and double via four typed change events.

nodes.name: INumberReverseBinder
nodes.summary: Interface combining IReverseBinder for int/long/float/double, exposing typed change events whose default implementations bridge to the generic ValueChanged surface.

nodes.name: SwitcherBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract switcher binders that select between two pre-configured values based on a bound boolean, in plain, target-bound, and converter-aware generic variants.

nodes.name: SwitcherBinder
nodes.summary: Three abstract IBinder<bool> bases that map a bound boolean to one of two serialized values: SwitcherBinder<T> over Binder, and SwitcherBinder<TTarget,T> / SwitcherBinder<TTarget,T,TConverter> over TargetBinder with optional conversion.

nodes.name: SwitcherFloatBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract switcher binder specializing SwitcherBinder to a float value type with an optional float converter resolved per Unity version.

nodes.name: SwitcherFloatBinder
nodes.summary: Specializes SwitcherBinder<TTarget, float, IConverter<float,float>>, resolving the converter via a version-conditional helper and leaving SetValue for subclasses.

nodes.name: SwitcherIntBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract switcher binder specializing SwitcherBinder to an int value type with an optional int converter resolved per Unity version.

nodes.name: SwitcherIntBinder
nodes.summary: Specializes SwitcherBinder<TTarget, int, converter>, resolving the converter via a version-conditional helper for int switching.

nodes.name: SwitcherStringBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract switcher binder specializing SwitcherBinder to a string value type with an optional string converter resolved per Unity version.

nodes.name: SwitcherStringBinder
nodes.summary: Specializes SwitcherBinder<TTarget, string, converter>, resolving the converter via a version-conditional helper for string switching.

nodes.name: TargetBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract base binders that bind a target object's property via get/set accessors, supporting OneWay/OneTime and OneWayToSource reverse binding with optional conversion.

nodes.name: TargetBinder
nodes.summary: Abstract TargetBinder<TTarget,TProperty> exposing an abstract Property accessor, applying converted ViewModel values via SetValue and emitting ValueChanged for reverse binding; includes a converter-aware variant.

nodes.name: TargetBoolBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract target-property binder specializing TargetBinder to a bool property, with optional value inversion applied during conversion.

nodes.name: TargetBoolBinder
nodes.summary: Specializes TargetBinder for a bool target property, overriding GetConvertedValue to optionally invert the bound boolean.

nodes.name: TargetFloatBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract target-property binder for a float property that implements INumberBinder/INumberReverseBinder, accepting all numeric types and broadcasting to all numeric reverse events.

nodes.name: TargetFloatBinder
nodes.summary: Extends TargetBinder<TTarget,float,converter> and implements INumberBinder/INumberReverseBinder, widening int/long/double to float on set and broadcasting the value to all numeric change events in OneWayToSource mode.

nodes.name: TargetIntBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract target-property binder for an int property that implements INumberBinder/INumberReverseBinder, accepting all numeric types and broadcasting to all numeric reverse events.

nodes.name: TargetIntBinder
nodes.summary: Extends TargetBinder<TTarget,int,converter> and implements INumberBinder/INumberReverseBinder, converting numeric inputs to int on set and broadcasting the value to all numeric change events in OneWayToSource mode.

nodes.name: TargetStringBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract target-property binder specializing TargetBinder to a string property with an optional string converter resolved per Unity version.

nodes.name: TargetStringBinder
nodes.summary: Specializes TargetBinder<TTarget,string,converter>, resolving the converter via a version-conditional helper for string property binding.

nodes.name: OneTimeValue.cs
nodes.summary: Defines OneTimeValue<T>, a OneWayValue<T> subclass locked to BindMode.OneTime so the binder accepts a ViewModel value exactly once.

nodes.name: OneTimeValue
nodes.summary: Generic one-time value binder; extends OneWayValue<T> with constructors that force BindMode.OneTime and forward an optional converter.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceValue.cs
nodes.summary: Defines OneWayToSourceValue<T>, a value binder pre-configured for BindMode.OneWayToSource that pushes View-side values back to the ViewModel.

nodes.name: OneWayToSourceValue
nodes.summary: Generic one-way-to-source value binder; extends TwoWayValue<T> with constructors locked to BindMode.OneWayToSource.

nodes.name: OneWayValue.cs
nodes.summary: Defines OneWayValue<T>, a Binder implementing IBinder<T> that stores the latest ViewModel value (optionally converted) and raises a Changed event; rejects TwoWay mode.

nodes.name: OneWayValue
nodes.summary: Serializable generic binder that stores an incoming ViewModel value through an optional IConverter, exposes it via Value, fires Changed, and supports an implicit conversion to T.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit interface implementation of IBinder<T>.SetValue plus an implicit operator T(OneWayValue<T>); uses Unity SerializeField/SerializeReference under version preprocessor guards.

nodes.name: TwoWayValue.cs
nodes.summary: Defines TwoWayValue<T>, a Binder implementing IBinder<T> and IReverseBinder<T> that synchronises a value in both directions between ViewModel and View across all bind modes.

nodes.name: TwoWayValue
nodes.summary: Serializable bidirectional binder: stores ViewModel-pushed values (via optional converter, raising Changed) and propagates View-side Value changes back through IReverseBinder<T>.ValueChanged; OnBound seeds the source in OneWayToSource mode.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements two binder interfaces with explicit event accessors; [BindModeOverride(IsAll = true)] permits every BindMode.

nodes.name: ICollectionComparer.cs
nodes.summary: Declares ICollectionComparer<T>, the abstraction returning an IComparer<T> used to sort observable collections in the StarterKit.

nodes.name: AndCompositeCollectionFilter.cs
nodes.summary: Composite collection filter that ANDs an array of child filters: an element passes only if every child predicate accepts it.

nodes.name: AndCompositeCollectionFilter
nodes.summary: Generic ICollectionFilter<T> implementation whose Get returns a predicate that is true only when all child filter predicates accept the value (LINQ All).

nodes.name: OrCompositeCollectionFilter.cs
nodes.summary: Composite collection filter that ORs an array of child filters: an element passes if any non-null child predicate accepts it.

nodes.name: OrCompositeCollectionFilter
nodes.summary: Generic ICollectionFilter<T> implementation whose Get returns a predicate that is true when any child filter predicate accepts the value (LINQ Any over non-null predicates).

nodes.name: ICollectionFilter.cs
nodes.summary: Declares ICollectionFilter<T>, the abstraction returning a Predicate<T> used to filter observable collections in the StarterKit.

nodes.name: ICanExecuteView.cs
nodes.summary: Declares ICanExecuteView, the abstraction with SetCanExecute(bool) that reflects a command's can-execute state onto a View element.

nodes.name: SequenceCanExecuteView.cs
nodes.summary: Composite ICanExecuteView that fans out a single SetCanExecute call to an array of child can-execute views.

nodes.name: SequenceCanExecuteView
nodes.summary: Sealed ICanExecuteView implementation that forwards each SetCanExecute(bool) to every view in a serialized array of child ICanExecuteView instances.

nodes.name: Comparisons.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the Comparisons enum (Equal, NotEqual, Greater, Less, etc.) used by numeric-to-bool converters to select a comparison operator.

nodes.name: NumberToBoolConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Converter that turns float/double/int/long values into booleans by comparing them against a threshold using a selectable Comparisons operator.

nodes.name: NumberToBoolConverter
nodes.summary: Implements the four numeric IConverter*ToBool interfaces; each Convert routes through a shared Compare helper that evaluates the configured Comparisons operator (with float-approximate equality).
nodes.languageNotes: Single class implements IConverterFloatToBool/DoubleToBool/IntToBool/LongToBool; private Approximately uses Math.Abs/Math.Max epsilon comparison.

nodes.name: ObjectNullToBoolConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Converter that maps an object reference to a boolean based on null-ness, with an optional invert flag.

nodes.name: ObjectNullToBoolConverter
nodes.summary: IConverter implementation returning whether an object is non-null (optionally inverted via the serialized _isInvert flag).

nodes.name: StringEmptyToBoolConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Converter that maps a string to a boolean based on whether it is null-or-empty, with an optional invert flag.

nodes.name: StringEmptyToBoolConverter
nodes.summary: IConverter implementation returning string.IsNullOrEmpty(value), optionally inverted via the serialized _isInvert flag.

nodes.name: ConverterExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension helper that wraps a Func<TFrom,TTo> delegate into an IConverter via GenericFuncConverter, letting lambdas be used wherever a converter is expected.

nodes.name: GenericFuncConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Adapter converter that delegates IConverter.Convert to a wrapped Func<TFrom,TTo> delegate, guarding against a null function.

nodes.name: GenericFuncConverter
nodes.summary: Generic IConverter<TFrom,TTo> that stores a delegate and invokes it in Convert; throws ArgumentNullException when constructed with a null converter.

nodes.name: IConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Declares the core IConverter<TFrom,TTo> abstraction with a single Convert method, the contract every StarterKit value converter implements.

nodes.name: ArithmeticNumberConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Numeric converter applying a NumberOperation with a coefficient (add/subtract/multiply/divide) across int, float, double and long, with cross-type Convert overloads.

nodes.name: ArithmeticNumberConverter
nodes.summary: Implements 16 numeric IConverter interfaces by funneling all Convert overloads through a double-based core that applies the configured NumberOperation; Divide guards against divide-by-zero with a Unity log error.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit interface implementation for 16 IConverter<,> variants; numeric overloads cast through ((IConverter<double,double>)this).Convert to share one arithmetic core.

nodes.name: NumberOperation.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the NumberOperation enum (Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide, etc.) selecting the arithmetic operation used by ArithmeticNumberConverter.

nodes.name: SequenceConverters.cs
nodes.summary: Composite converter that chains multiple IConverter<T,T> instances, applying each in sequence to transform a value.

nodes.name: SequenceConverters
nodes.summary: Generic IConverter<T,T> that folds a value through a serialized array of converters, returning the final transformed result.

nodes.name: BoolConverterSpecificExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods that wrap Func<...,bool> delegates and generic IConverter<...,bool> instances into the strongly-typed IConverter*ToBool specific converter types.

nodes.name: BoolConverterSpecificExtensions
nodes.summary: Static class with ToConvert/ToConvertSpecific overloads that adapt double/float/int/long/object/string predicates into concrete ConverterXToBool instances typed as the IConverterXToBool interfaces.

nodes.name: IConverterDoubleToBool.cs

nodes.name: CultureInfoMode.cs

nodes.name: GenericToString.cs

nodes.name: DynamicViewModel.Create.cs
nodes.summary: Partial of DynamicViewModel providing a large family of static Create overloads (1 to 8 typed properties, with and without the throw-on-missing flag) that assemble the property dictionary via DynamicPropertyFactory.
nodes.languageNotes: 16 overloaded static Create methods differing only in generic arity; each builds a Dictionary<string, IDynamicProperty> from DynamicPropertyFactory.Create calls.

nodes.name: DynamicViewModel
nodes.summary: Partial DynamicViewModel declaration hosting the static Create factory overloads that wire named properties into a new DynamicViewModel.

nodes.name: DynamicViewModel.cs
nodes.summary: Runtime-constructed IViewModel backed by a dictionary of IDynamicProperty instances keyed by id; resolves bindable members by id at bind time with optional throw-on-missing and a profiler marker.
nodes.languageNotes: Sealed partial class implementing IViewModel; includes an implicit operator from Dictionary<string, IDynamicProperty> and ProfilerMarker guarded by Unity defines.

nodes.name: DynamicViewModel
nodes.summary: IViewModel implementation whose FindBindableMember looks up an IDynamicProperty by id and returns its binder adder, throwing or returning default when not found.

nodes.name: IDynamicProperty.cs
nodes.summary: Interface for a dynamic property that can hand back an IBinderAdder, allowing DynamicViewModel to expose runtime-defined bindable members.

nodes.name: OneTimeDynamicProperty.cs
nodes.summary: IDynamicProperty implementation for OneTime binding; wraps an immutable value and exposes it via a OneTimeBindableMember adder.

nodes.name: OneWayDynamicProperty.cs
nodes.summary: IDynamicProperty implementation for OneWay binding; holds a OneWayBindableMember initialized from the supplied value.

nodes.name: TwoWayDynamicProperty.cs
nodes.summary: IDynamicProperty implementation for TwoWay binding; backs a TwoWayBindableMember with a SetValue callback that updates the stored value with an equality guard.

nodes.name: TwoWayDynamicProperty
nodes.summary: Two-way dynamic property wrapping a TwoWayBindableMember<T>; its SetValue callback skips updates when the new value equals the current one.

nodes.name: EmptyViewModel.cs
nodes.summary: Null-object IViewModel whose FindBindableMember always returns default; used as a no-op placeholder where a ViewModel is required but none should bind.

nodes.name: ValueViewModel.cs
nodes.summary: Family of source-generated [ViewModel] classes (1 to 4 typed values) exposing each value as a [TwoWayBind] property with optional equality-checked change notification.
nodes.languageNotes: Four generic partial [ViewModel] classes (ValueViewModel<T> .. <T1,T2,T3,T4>) sharing the same shape; bindable properties and IViewModel impl are emitted by the Roslyn generator and not present in source.

nodes.name: ValueViewModel
nodes.summary: Generic single/multi-value ViewModel; each value is a [TwoWayBind] property that raises change notifications, optionally gated by an equality check.

nodes.name: SliderCommandBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Defines a family of partial SliderCommandBinder classes (parameterless plus 1, 2 and 3 generic command parameters) that wire a Unity Slider's onValueChanged event to int/long/float/double IRelayCommands, executing the command and reflecting CanExecute state into the slider's interactability.

nodes.name: SliderCommandBinder
