nodes.name: Vector3CombineConverter
nodes.summary: Combines source and destination Vector3 values according to a combine mode, supporting optional pre/post converter delegation for composable transformations.

nodes.name: Vector3SubstitutionConverter.cs
nodes.summary: Value converter that substitutes selected components of an incoming Vector3 while keeping the others, branching across many axis-combination modes.

nodes.name: Vector3SubstitutionConverter
nodes.summary: Rebuilds a Vector3 by substituting one or more axes from the source value, with a large switch over the configured substitution mode.

nodes.name: Convert
nodes.summary: Produces the substituted Vector3 by selecting which axes to take from the input value across all supported substitution modes.

nodes.name: Vector3ToVector2Converter.cs
nodes.summary: Value converter that reduces a Vector3 to a Vector2 by projecting two chosen axes onto the result.

nodes.name: Vector3ToVector2Converter
nodes.summary: Converts a Vector3 to a Vector2 by selecting which pair of axes to project according to the configured values mode.

nodes.name: SerializableMonoScript.cs
nodes.summary: Serializable wrapper that persists a System.Type via its assembly-qualified name, with implicit Type conversions and a generic variant for inspector-friendly type references.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses implicit operators and a [Serializable] string-backed Type cache for Unity inspector serialization.

nodes.name: SerializableMonoScript
nodes.summary: Persists a System.Type as its assembly-qualified name string and lazily resolves it back, exposing implicit conversions to and from Type.

nodes.name: EventMonoView.cs
nodes.summary: MonoView subclass that raises serialized UnityEvents on view initialization and deinitialization, exposing lifecycle hooks to the inspector.

nodes.name: EventMonoView
nodes.summary: View that invokes serialized initialized/deinitialized UnityEvents from the MonoView lifecycle hooks.

nodes.name: IViewFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Defines the generic view factory interface family (with and without ViewModel parameters and result types) for constructing views from view models.

nodes.name: IViewFactoryRelease.cs
nodes.summary: Interface declaring a Release method for view factories that need to return or dispose previously created views.

nodes.name: IViewFactoryWithKey.cs
nodes.summary: Generic keyed view factory interface family for creating views selected by a key argument alongside an optional view model.

nodes.name: PoolSettings.cs
nodes.summary: Readonly struct holding initial and maximum pool sizes used to configure pooled view factories.

nodes.name: PrefabViewFactory.cs
nodes.summary: View factory that instantiates view instances from a prefab, optionally parenting to a container and managing sibling index ordering.

nodes.name: PrefabViewFactory
nodes.summary: Instantiates and releases prefab-based views, initializing them with a view model and applying configured sibling ordering.

nodes.name: PrefabViewPool.cs
nodes.summary: Pooling prefab view factory that reuses view instances via an object pool, activating on get and deactivating on release to reduce instantiation cost.

nodes.name: PrefabViewPool
nodes.summary: Extends prefab view creation with an object pool, overriding create/get/release/destroy hooks to recycle GameObject-backed views.

nodes.name: IViewFactoryMonoView.cs
nodes.summary: Marker interface specializing IViewFactory for the MonoView type to ease dependency-injection registration.

nodes.name: IComponentInitializable.cs
nodes.summary: Interface declaring an Initialize contract for view initializer components that need to set up state.

nodes.name: InitializeComponent.cs
nodes.summary: Resolves a component from MonoBehaviour, ScriptableObject, scene reference, or DI container based on a configured ResolveType, validating the selection in the editor.
nodes.languageNotes: Branches on Zenject/VContainer DI integration via conditional compilation symbols.

nodes.name: InitializeComponent
nodes.summary: Base initializer component that resolves its target object from the configured source (mono, reference, scriptable object, or DI) and validates configuration.

nodes.name: GetComponent
nodes.summary: Returns the resolved component for the current ResolveType, falling back to Zenject or VContainer DI resolution when configured.

nodes.name: Validate
nodes.summary: Editor-time validation that checks the configured resolve source is consistent with the assigned references.

nodes.name: ResolveType.cs
nodes.summary: Enum enumerating component resolution strategies (Mono, References, ScriptableObject, and conditionally Di) for view initializer components.
nodes.languageNotes: The Di member is gated behind Zenject/VContainer integration compilation symbols.

nodes.name: ViewInitializeComponent.cs
nodes.summary: InitializeComponent specialization that resolves and validates an IView instance for use by view initializers.

nodes.name: ViewInitializeComponent
nodes.summary: Concrete initializer component that supplies an IView, overriding validation and DI type resolution for views.

nodes.name: ViewModelInitializeComponent.cs
nodes.summary: InitializeComponent specialization that resolves and validates an IViewModel instance for use by view initializers.

nodes.name: ViewModelInitializeComponent
nodes.summary: Concrete initializer component that supplies an IViewModel, overriding validation and DI type resolution for view models.

nodes.name: ViewInitializer.cs
nodes.summary: MonoBehaviour view initializer that resolves a view model and drives view initialization/deinitialization across configurable Unity lifecycle stages with DI integration.
nodes.languageNotes: Hooks every Unity lifecycle callback (Awake/Start/OnEnable/OnDisable/OnDestroy) and exposes Zenject/VContainer constructors.

nodes.name: ViewInitializer
nodes.summary: Orchestrates view initialization at a chosen lifecycle stage, binding the resolved view model to its views and disposing them on destroy.

nodes.name: OnDestroy
nodes.summary: Disposes the views and optionally the view model when the initializer GameObject is destroyed.

nodes.name: ViewInitializerBase.cs
nodes.summary: Abstract base for view initializers holding the view collection, initialization state, and shared validation that gathers views from initializer components.

nodes.name: ViewInitializerBase
nodes.summary: Provides the common view-list management, initialization-state tracking, and editor validation shared by concrete view initializers.

nodes.name: ViewInitializerManual.cs
nodes.summary: View initializer that exposes explicit Initialize/Deinitialize methods for manually binding a view model to views from user code rather than the Unity lifecycle.

nodes.name: ViewInitializerManual
nodes.summary: Concrete initializer requiring manual Initialize/Deinitialize calls to bind a view model and dispose views on destroy.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-AspidMvvmSettingsWindow.uss
nodes.summary: UI Toolkit stylesheet defining the layout and theming for the Aspid MVVM settings editor window.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-AspidPropertyField.uss
nodes.summary: UI Toolkit stylesheet styling the custom Aspid property field used in the inspector for bindable members.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-CommandContainer.uss
nodes.summary: Small UI Toolkit stylesheet styling the command container element shown for relay commands in the inspector.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-MonoBinder.uss
nodes.summary: Unity USS stylesheet defining the layout for the MonoBinder inspector ID/View selector, including dropdown rows and restore-button styling.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-MonoBinderPropertyField.uss
nodes.summary: Small USS stylesheet styling the MonoBinder property field rendered in the custom inspector.

nodes.name: Aspid-MVVM-UnassignedBinders.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the editor UI that highlights binders not yet assigned to a View or ID.

nodes.name: aspid-debug-view-model-panel.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the debug ViewModel inspection panel shown in the Unity editor at design/run time.

nodes.name: aspid-meta-info-container.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the meta-info container element of the debug ViewModel panel.

nodes.name: aspid-debug-composite-field.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the composite (nested object) field rendered in the debug ViewModel panel.

nodes.name: aspid-debug-enumerable-field.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the enumerable/collection field rendered in the debug ViewModel panel.

nodes.name: aspid-debug-field.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet defining the base look of individual debug fields in the ViewModel inspection panel.

nodes.name: aspid-delegate.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the editor field that displays delegate/event bindings.

nodes.name: aspid-relay-command.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the editor field that renders RelayCommand properties with an invoke button.

nodes.name: aspid-slider.uss
nodes.summary: USS stylesheet for the custom slider field used in Aspid editor inspectors.

nodes.name: Aspid.MVVM.Unity.Editor.asmdef
nodes.summary: Unity assembly definition for the editor-only Aspid.MVVM.Unity.Editor assembly, referencing the core MVVM, FastTools, and Collections assemblies and restricted to the Editor platform.
nodes.languageNotes: includePlatforms is set to Editor only, so this assembly is excluded from runtime builds.

nodes.name: AssemblyInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Assembly-level attribute declarations for the editor assembly (e.g. InternalsVisibleTo / metadata).

nodes.name: AddBinderContextMenu.cs
nodes.summary: Editor extension that adds an 'Add Binder' entry to the context menu of bindable properties, discovering compatible binder types by scanning assemblies for AddBinderContextMenu attributes.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses AppDomain assembly scanning with ReflectionTypeLoadException-safe SafeGetTypes to enumerate binder types.

nodes.name: AddBinderContextMenu
nodes.summary: InitializeOnLoad editor class that registers a contextual property menu hook and resolves binder component types matching a target property's type via cached attribute metadata.

nodes.name: FindTypesWithTargetPropertyTypeAttribute
nodes.summary: Resolves the set of binder component types whose AddBinderContextMenu metadata is assignable to the target object's property type, returning candidate menu results.

nodes.name: OnContextualPropertyMenu
nodes.summary: Callback that appends 'Add Binder' menu items to a property's contextual menu, attaching the chosen binder component to the target GameObject when selected.

nodes.name: Initialize
nodes.summary: Initializes the cached context list by scanning all loaded assemblies for valid binder context types and subscribes to the contextual property menu event.

nodes.name: BinderEditorConstants.cs
nodes.summary: Holds string constants used across binder editor UI such as the 'No ID'/'No View' placeholder labels and the design-time ViewModel prefix.

nodes.name: BinderEditorConstants
nodes.summary: Static container of constant placeholder strings (NoId, NoView, DesignViewModelPrefix) consumed by binder editor dropdowns.

nodes.name: BinderEditorUtilities.cs
nodes.summary: Static helpers that resolve the available Views in a binder's hierarchy and the binder IDs each View declares via require-binder fields.

nodes.name: BinderEditorUtilities
nodes.summary: Static utility class exposing GetViews and GetIds used to populate the binder inspector's View and ID dropdowns.

nodes.name: GetIds
nodes.summary: Returns the binder ID data for require-binder fields of a View whose declared field type is compatible with the given binder instance.

nodes.name: GetViews
nodes.summary: Collects all IView components found on the binder's parent GameObject into BinderViewData entries.

nodes.name: BindModeDrawer.cs
nodes.summary: Custom Unity property drawer for BindMode fields that renders a dropdown limited to the modes permitted by a BindModeOverrideAttribute on the owning class.
nodes.languageNotes: Supports both legacy IMGUI (OnGUI) and UIElements (CreatePropertyGUI) rendering paths.

nodes.name: BindModeDrawer
nodes.summary: Sealed PropertyDrawer for BindMode/BindModeAttribute that resolves available bind modes via reflection of override attributes and reflects edits back to the serialized property, rebinding when needed.

nodes.name: CreatePropertyGUI
nodes.summary: Builds the UIElements popup field for selecting a bind mode and wires its change callback to persist the selected value.

nodes.name: OnGUI
nodes.summary: IMGUI rendering path that draws a popup of available bind modes and applies the selected index back to the serialized property.

nodes.name: ResolveBindModes
nodes.summary: Maps a bind-mode provider's allowed-mode flags to a concrete BindModes set (all, one-way, two-way, or explicit list).

nodes.name: InitializeOverrideAttribute
nodes.summary: Lazily resolves and caches the BindModeOverrideAttribute on the owning class instance via reflection.

nodes.name: BinderDropdownData.cs
nodes.summary: Immutable struct and factory methods that build the choices and selected index for the binder inspector's ID and View dropdowns.

nodes.name: BinderDropdownData
nodes.summary: Internal readonly struct carrying dropdown index, choices, and a has-previous flag, with static factories CreateIdDropdownData and CreateViewDropdownData that build the lists from the editor state.
nodes.languageNotes: C# readonly struct used as immutable value-type DTO for inspector dropdown population.

nodes.name: CreateIdDropdownData
nodes.summary: Builds the ID dropdown data from the editor's selected View, inserting a none-value entry and resolving the current/previous ID selection index.

nodes.name: CreateViewDropdownData
nodes.summary: Builds the View dropdown data from the binder's available Views, inserting a none-value entry and resolving the current selection by view name.

nodes.name: BinderIdData.cs
nodes.summary: Tiny readonly struct wrapping a single binder ID string used by the editor dropdown utilities.

nodes.name: BinderViewData.cs
nodes.summary: Readonly struct pairing an IView with a human-readable name, including logic to disambiguate multiple components of the same type on a GameObject.

nodes.name: BinderViewData
nodes.summary: Public readonly struct holding an IView reference and its display name; GetViewName builds an indexed, type-qualified label for views sharing a component type.

nodes.name: MonoBinderEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Custom Unity Editor for MonoBinder components that builds a UIElements inspector with ID/View dropdown selectors, save/restore logic, and validation against the bound View.
nodes.languageNotes: CustomEditor with editorForChildClasses:true so it applies to all MonoBinder subclasses; uses hook methods (OnEnabling/OnEnabled/etc.) for extensibility.

nodes.name: MonoBinderEditor
nodes.summary: Internal Editor subclass managing the MonoBinder inspector lifecycle: finds serialized properties, builds the visual element, wires dropdown/pointer callbacks, and saves/restores/validates the binder's ID and View.

nodes.name: MonoBinderVisualElement.cs
nodes.summary: UIElements VisualElement that renders the MonoBinder inspector UI - header, ID/View selectors, restore buttons, base inspector, and a scrollable logs panel.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads its stylesheet from Resources at static init and exposes virtual members so derived binder editors can customize status/subtext.

nodes.name: MonoBinderVisualElement
nodes.summary: Internal VisualElement subclass that composes the binder inspector tree (header, dropdown selectors, property fields, logs list) and updates button visibility and dropdown colors based on editor state.

nodes.name: MonoBinderIdProperty.cs
nodes.summary: Wraps the serialized ID field of a MonoBinder, exposing current/previous values and validating the ID against the bound View's require-binder fields.

nodes.name: MonoBinderIdProperty
nodes.summary: Editor-side wrapper over the binder's serialized ID SerializedProperty, providing typed access to the value and its previous value plus Validate against a resolved View property.

nodes.name: Validate
nodes.summary: Validates the stored binder ID against the View's require-binder fields, clearing or correcting it when no matching field is found.

nodes.name: MonoBinderViewProperty.cs
nodes.summary: Wraps the serialized View field of a MonoBinder, exposing current/previous value and name, and validating that the assigned View still exists on the binder's parent.

nodes.name: MonoBinderViewProperty
nodes.summary: Editor-side wrapper over the binder's serialized View SerializedProperty exposing value, previous value and name, with Validate ensuring the bound IView component is still present.

nodes.name: Validate
nodes.summary: Validates that the serialized View still corresponds to an IView component on the binder's parent GameObject, clearing it otherwise.

nodes.name: FieldInfoExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Reflection extension methods that set a FieldInfo from a cast value (handling array element conversion) and read a field's value as a typed array.

nodes.name: FieldInfoExtensions
nodes.summary: Static class of FieldInfo extension methods (SetValueFromCastValue, GetValueAsArray) used by binder editor reflection code to read/write fields with array coercion.

nodes.name: SetValueFromCastValue
nodes.summary: Sets a FieldInfo's value, copying into a newly allocated typed array when the field type is an array so element types match.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelPanel.cs
nodes.summary: Debug inspector panel that reflects over a View's ViewModel, builds searchable bind/command/other field groups, and supports a typed search query syntax for filtering displayed members.
nodes.languageNotes: Partitions members into bind/command/other categories using attribute and reflection checks, then renders DebugField VisualElements per group.

nodes.name: BuildDataContainer
nodes.summary: Reflects over the ViewModel's properties and fields, categorizes them into bind/command/other groups, and constructs the tabbed searchable UI with DebugField elements.

nodes.name: Search
nodes.summary: Applies a parsed search query across the bind/command/other field lists, toggling field visibility based on name and type filters.

nodes.name: ParseSearchQuery
nodes.summary: Parses the search input into a name query and optional type filter using a type-marker delimiter syntax.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelPanel
nodes.summary: Constructs the panel from a view, resolves its ViewModel, and builds the collapsible titled data container.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelPanel
nodes.summary: VisualElement that renders and live-updates a ViewModel's debug fields with categorized, searchable groups.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelTabView.cs
nodes.summary: Tab-style toggle bar for the debug panel that persists per-category (bind/other/command) visibility selections in EditorPrefs and updates button visuals.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelTabView
nodes.summary: Builds the three category toggle buttons, wiring EditorPrefs-backed click handlers that show/hide their associated field containers.

nodes.name: DebugViewModelTabView
nodes.summary: VisualElement tab bar toggling the visibility of bind/other/command field groups in the debug panel.

nodes.name: BindFieldContext.cs
nodes.summary: IFieldContext implementation for a [Bind] field, reading from the field and writing through its generated property to keep the ViewModel notified.

nodes.name: BindFieldContext
nodes.summary: Resolves the generated property paired with a bind field so writes route through it, validating the ViewModel attribute.

nodes.name: BindFieldContext
nodes.summary: Field context that reads a bind field's value and writes via its generated property for the debug inspector.

nodes.name: BindPropertyContext.cs
nodes.summary: IFieldContext implementation for a bindable property, reading and writing directly through the property for the debug inspector.

nodes.name: BindPropertyContext
nodes.summary: Field context that gets and sets a bindable property value for the debug inspector.

nodes.name: CollectionElementContext.cs
nodes.summary: IFieldContext implementation representing a single element of a collection, supporting indexed read/write and element-type inference for arrays and generic collections.

nodes.name: GetElementType
nodes.summary: Infers the element type of a collection from its array element type or first generic argument.

nodes.name: CollectionElementContext
nodes.summary: Field context for an indexed collection element with read/write and element-type resolution.

nodes.name: DictionaryElementContext.cs
nodes.summary: IFieldContext implementation representing a single dictionary entry, exposing it as a KeyValuePair and routing writes by key.

nodes.name: DictionaryElementContext
nodes.summary: Field context for a keyed dictionary entry, presenting it as a KeyValuePair for the debug inspector.

nodes.name: FieldContext.cs
nodes.summary: Default IFieldContext implementation wrapping an arbitrary member, delegating value access and attribute inspection through MemberInfo extensions.

nodes.name: FieldContext
nodes.summary: Generic member-backed field context used as the fallback context for the debug inspector.

nodes.name: FieldContextFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Factory that selects the appropriate IFieldContext (BindField, BindProperty, or generic FieldContext) for a member based on its bind attributes.

nodes.name: Create
nodes.summary: Chooses and instantiates the correct field context implementation for a member according to its bind metadata.

nodes.name: FieldContextFactory
nodes.summary: Static factory creating the appropriate field-context type for debug-panel members.

nodes.name: IFieldContext.cs
nodes.summary: Interface defining the contract for debug-panel field contexts: target, member metadata, value get/set, and attribute inspection.

nodes.name: IFieldContext
nodes.summary: Contract for value access and attribute inspection of a member rendered in the debug inspector.

nodes.name: DebugAnimationCurveField.cs
nodes.summary: Debug inspector field that binds an AnimationCurve VisualElement to an IFieldContext, syncing edits back and refreshing on value change.

nodes.name: DebugAnimationCurveField
nodes.summary: CurveField-based debug field wired to an IFieldContext for live AnimationCurve editing.

nodes.name: DebugBoolField.cs
nodes.summary: Debug inspector field that binds a boolean Toggle to an IFieldContext, syncing edits back and refreshing on value change.

nodes.name: DebugBoolField
nodes.summary: Toggle-based debug field wired to an IFieldContext for live boolean editing.

nodes.name: DebugBoundsField.cs
nodes.summary: Debug inspector field that binds a Bounds VisualElement to an IFieldContext, syncing edits back and refreshing on value change.

nodes.name: DebugBoundsField
nodes.summary: BoundsField-based debug field wired to an IFieldContext for live Bounds editing.

nodes.name: TypeExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Editor reflection helpers that produce friendly display names for generic types and resolve the underlying Unity-serializable type of a field, property, or generic Bindable wrapper.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses recursive generic-argument unwrapping to map Bindable<T>/array/list types to their serializable element type.

nodes.name: GetTypeDisplayName
nodes.summary: Builds a human-readable type name, expanding generic arguments into an angle-bracket form for editor display.

nodes.name: GetUnitySerializableType
nodes.summary: Recursively resolves the Unity-serializable element type behind generic Bindable wrappers, arrays, and lists, throwing when unresolvable.

nodes.name: TypeExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class grouping editor-side reflection helpers for type display names and serializable-type resolution.

nodes.name: HeaderNameHelper.cs
nodes.summary: Editor helper that strips a trailing suffix from a member name while preserving any numeric index decoration, used to tidy header labels in the inspector.

nodes.name: StripTrailingSuffixPreservingIndex
nodes.summary: Removes a trailing suffix from a name, re-attaching any bracketed index segment so list element labels stay readable.

nodes.name: NameHelper.cs
nodes.summary: Editor helper that mirrors the source generator's naming rules — converting bind field names to generated property names, stripping field prefixes, and resolving backing fields for auto-properties.
nodes.languageNotes: Re-implements the generator's PascalCase conversion and prefix stripping so the inspector can correlate fields with generated properties.

nodes.name: GetGeneratedPropertyName
nodes.summary: Strips the field prefix and PascalCases the remainder to reproduce the property name emitted by the bind generator.

nodes.name: TryGetBackingFieldName
nodes.summary: Attempts to locate the backing field for a property by probing common naming conventions across the declaring type and its bases.

nodes.name: IsAutoProperty
nodes.summary: Determines whether a property is an auto-property by checking for a compiler-generated backing field.

nodes.name: NameHelper
nodes.summary: Static helper class that reproduces generator naming conventions and resolves backing fields for editor tooling.

nodes.name: BindablePropertyMeta.cs
nodes.summary: Editor metadata model that describes a single bindable property on a ViewModel — its id, name, bind mode, header grouping — and provides the predicate that decides whether a member is a bindable property.

nodes.name: BindablePropertyMeta
nodes.summary: Constructs metadata for a bindable property, extracting bind id, header attributes, and bind mode from the member and its backing field.

nodes.name: IsBindableProperty
nodes.summary: Predicate that detects whether a member represents a bindable property by inspecting bind attributes and BindAlso references.

nodes.name: BindablePropertyMeta
nodes.summary: Immutable metadata record describing a bindable property of a ViewModel for the debug/inspector tooling.

nodes.name: BinderPropertyMeta.cs
nodes.summary: Editor metadata model that describes a binder property on a View — its serializable type, id, and name — with a predicate to identify binder members.

nodes.name: BinderPropertyMeta
nodes.summary: Builds binder property metadata, resolving the binder id from AsBinder/BindId attributes and the serializable type.

nodes.name: IsBinderProperty
nodes.summary: Predicate that determines whether a member is a binder property by checking attributes and IBinder assignability.

nodes.name: BinderPropertyMeta
nodes.summary: Immutable metadata record describing a binder property of a View for editor tooling.

nodes.name: ViewMeta.cs
nodes.summary: Editor metadata model that aggregates all binder properties of an IView type into a queryable collection.

nodes.name: ViewMeta
nodes.summary: Reflects over an IView type and collects its binder properties as BinderPropertyMeta instances.

nodes.name: ViewModelMeta.cs
nodes.summary: Editor metadata model that aggregates and orders all bindable properties of an IViewModel type for inspector display.

nodes.name: ViewModelMeta
nodes.summary: Reflects over an IViewModel type, filters bindable properties, and orders them with a MemberComparer into BindablePropertyMeta instances.

nodes.name: MemberInfoExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Reflection extension methods that uniformly read/write values and inspect type/readonly state across both FieldInfo and PropertyInfo members.

nodes.name: SetValue
nodes.summary: Sets a member value, dispatching to FieldInfo.SetValue or the property setter and throwing for unsupported member kinds.

nodes.name: MemberInfoExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class unifying field/property reflection access for editor tooling.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinderExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Extension methods that enumerate the RequireBinder-attributed fields of a View and flatten their nested children for required-binder validation.

nodes.name: GetRequireBinderFields
nodes.summary: Reflects over a view's fields to collect those marked as required binders, returning RequiredFieldForMonoBinder descriptors.

nodes.name: GetRequireBinderFieldsInternal
nodes.summary: Recursively flattens required-binder fields and their child fields into a single list.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinderExtensions
nodes.summary: Static extension class for discovering and flattening required-binder fields on a View.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Editor-side model representing a field that requires a binder, recursively resolving nested children, required binder types, and validation state from RequireBinder attributes.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy reflection: walks attributes, generic arguments, and nested serializable types to build a validation tree.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinder
nodes.summary: Primary constructor that resolves the binder id, required types, validation flag, and child required-binder fields via reflection over the field and its attributes.

nodes.name: IsBinderMatchRequiredType
nodes.summary: Checks whether a binder's generic interface arguments satisfy any of the required types declared on the field.

nodes.name: IsRequireBinderField
nodes.summary: Predicate determining whether a field carries the RequireBinder attribute or qualifies as a validation field.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinder
nodes.summary: Model of a required-binder field with id, container reference, required types, and a recursively built tree of child requirements.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinder.FieldInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Partial of RequiredFieldForMonoBinder that adapts it to the FieldInfo abstraction by delegating reflection members to the wrapped field.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements FieldInfo by forwarding all abstract members to the underlying _field instance.

nodes.name: RequiredFieldForMonoBinder
nodes.summary: FieldInfo-implementing partial that forwards reflection calls to the wrapped field instance.

nodes.name: AspidMvvmSettings.cs
nodes.summary: Static editor settings facade that toggles framework scripting-define symbols (profiler, binder logging, editor checks) by adding/removing defines in Unity PlayerSettings.

nodes.name: AddDefine
nodes.summary: Adds a scripting-define symbol to the active build target if not already present and writes it back to PlayerSettings.

nodes.name: AspidMvvmSettings
nodes.summary: Static class exposing toggleable framework feature flags backed by PlayerSettings scripting-define symbols.

nodes.name: AspidMvvmSettingsWindow.cs
nodes.summary: UI Toolkit EditorWindow presenting the Aspid.MVVM settings panel with apply/revert toggles for profiler, binder logging, and editor checks, persisting changes through AspidMvvmSettings.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds the UI imperatively via UIToolkit VisualElement fluent extensions and a custom AspidToggle.

nodes.name: CreateContent
nodes.summary: Assembles the window layout — header, scrollable settings section, and footer — into the root container.

nodes.name: CreateSettingsSection
nodes.summary: Builds the settings toggles and apply/revert action buttons, wiring change-tracking callbacks.

nodes.name: OnApply
nodes.summary: Persists the pending toggle values to AspidMvvmSettings scripting defines and refreshes button states.

nodes.name: ShowWindow
nodes.summary: Menu entry point that opens and configures the settings window with title icon and minimum size.

nodes.name: AspidMvvmSettingsWindow
nodes.summary: EditorWindow that renders the Aspid.MVVM settings UI and applies toggle changes through AspidMvvmSettings.

nodes.name: DebugBoundsIntField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that wires a Unity BoundsIntField to a bound member context for inspecting and editing BoundsInt values in the ViewModel debugger.

nodes.name: DebugByteField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field presenting a byte value as an integer slider clamped to the type's min/max, two-way bound to the member context.

nodes.name: DebugCharField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that edits a single char value via a text field, converting the first non-empty character back to the bound member.

nodes.name: DebugColorField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field wrapping Unity's ColorField to inspect and edit Color values bound to a member context.

nodes.name: DebugCompositeField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that reflects over an arbitrary object's fields and properties, building a foldout of nested DebugFields with search support for inspecting composite values.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses reflection (GetMembersInfosIncludingBaseClasses, FieldInfo/PropertyInfo) plus auto-property backing-field filtering to flatten an object graph into nested debug fields.

nodes.name: DebugDecimalField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that displays a decimal value as its string representation in a read-only-style text field.

nodes.name: DebugDelegateField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that renders a bound delegate value, rebuilding either a null placeholder or an AspidDelegateField when the value changes.

nodes.name: DebugDisableTextField.cs
nodes.summary: Read-only text field variant used by debug fields to display values that cannot be edited.

nodes.name: DebugDoubleField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field pairing an optional clamping slider with a DoubleField for inspecting and editing double values bound to a member context.

nodes.name: DebugEnumerableField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that enumerates an IEnumerable value, building a searchable foldout of per-element DebugFields and resolving dictionary/collection element contexts via reflection.
nodes.languageNotes: Resolves the element type by scanning implemented IEnumerable<T> interfaces and branches between DictionaryElementContext and CollectionElementContext.

nodes.name: DebugEnumField.cs
nodes.summary: Editor debug field that picks an EnumFlagsField or EnumField based on whether the enum type carries the [Flags] attribute, two-way bound to the member context.

nodes.name: DebugField.cs
nodes.summary: Central editor debug field that builds the appropriate input field for any bound member via a large type-dispatch factory, handles labels, meta info, and search filtering across the ViewModel debugger inspector.
nodes.languageNotes: GetInputField is a type-switch factory instantiating every Debug*Field variant; Search implements hierarchical path/type filtering with recursive delegation to child searchable fields.

nodes.name: ArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject DI binder that adds typed runtime arguments (WithArguments overloads up to 6 params, plus explicit) to a binding's BindInfo before condition/copy stages.
nodes.languageNotes: Fluent builder pattern with many WithArguments arity overloads feeding InjectUtil.CreateTypePair into BindInfo.Arguments.

nodes.name: ArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: Binder in the Zenject fluent chain that records runtime constructor/inject arguments via WithArguments overloads, deriving from ConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.

nodes.name: ConcreteBinderGeneric.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject generic concrete binder that resolves the concrete implementation(s) for a binding via ToSelf/To overloads, producing a FromBinder for the next stage.

nodes.name: ConcreteBinderGeneric
nodes.summary: Strongly-typed concrete-binder stage exposing ToSelf and To<TConcrete> overloads that populate BindInfo.ToTypes and hand off to a FromBinderGeneric.

nodes.name: ConcreteBinderNonGeneric.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject non-generic concrete binder; the Type-array counterpart of ConcreteBinderGeneric, resolving concrete types at runtime via ToSelf/To overloads.

nodes.name: ConcreteBinderNonGeneric
nodes.summary: Reflection-based concrete-binder stage operating on Type arrays, populating BindInfo.ToTypes and producing a FromBinderNonGeneric for downstream binding.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdBinderGeneric.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder stage adding a WithId identifier filter before delegating to the generic concrete binder.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdBinderGeneric
nodes.summary: Generic ID-scoped binder extending ConcreteBinderGeneric, adding WithId(identifier) to set the binding identifier.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdBinderNonGeneric.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject non-generic counterpart of ConcreteIdBinderGeneric, adding WithId before delegating to the non-generic concrete binder.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdBinderNonGeneric
nodes.summary: Non-generic ID-scoped binder extending ConcreteBinderNonGeneric, adding WithId(identifier) to set the binding identifier.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder stage extending ArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder with a WithConcreteId step for scoping the concrete binding by identifier.

nodes.name: ConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: Binder adding WithConcreteId(id) on top of the argument/condition/copy chain, derived from ArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.

nodes.name: ConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder exposing conditional binding constraints (When, WhenInjectedInto, WhenNotInjectedInto) that attach a predicate to the binding's InjectContext.

nodes.name: ConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: Condition stage of the binding chain (extends CopyNonLazyBinder) that sets a Condition predicate based on injection context, with WhenInjectedInto/WhenNotInjectedInto helpers.

nodes.name: ConventionAssemblySelectionBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject convention-binding stage selecting which assemblies to scan via FromAssemblyContaining/FromThisAssembly/FromAssembliesWhere, feeding ConventionBindInfo assembly filters.

nodes.name: ConventionAssemblySelectionBinder
nodes.summary: First stage of convention-based binding that registers assembly filters on ConventionBindInfo and returns a ConventionSelectTypesBinder.

nodes.name: ConventionBindInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject model holding assembly and type filter predicates for convention binding, with ResolveTypes scanning AppDomain assemblies and caching the discovered types.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies plus a type cache and LINQ Where/SelectMany pipeline to resolve matching types.

nodes.name: ConventionBindInfo
nodes.summary: Accumulates assembly/type filter predicates (AddAssemblyFilter/AddTypeFilter) and resolves the matching set of types across loaded assemblies with caching.

nodes.name: ConventionFilterTypesBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject convention-binding stage offering rich type-filter predicates (DerivingFrom, WithAttribute, InNamespaces, WithSuffix/Prefix, MatchingRegex) that append filters to ConventionBindInfo.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest convention binder; combines reflection (HasAttribute, DerivesFrom) and regex matching to express declarative type-selection rules.

nodes.name: ConventionFilterTypesBinder
nodes.summary: Fluent type-filter stage adding predicate filters (inheritance, attributes, namespace, name suffix/prefix, regex) to the convention bind info.

nodes.name: ConventionSelectTypesBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject convention-binding stage choosing the broad category of types to bind (AllTypes, AllClasses, AllNonAbstractClasses, AllInterfaces) before fine-grained filtering.

nodes.name: ConventionSelectTypesBinder
nodes.summary: Selects the type category (all/classes/non-abstract/abstract/interfaces) for convention binding and creates a ConventionFilterTypesBinder for the next stage.

nodes.name: InstantiateCallbackConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder exposing OnInstantiated overloads that register a post-instantiation callback on the bound instance.

nodes.name: InstantiateCallbackConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: ConditionCopyNonLazyBinder subclass whose OnInstantiated overloads attach typed/untyped callbacks invoked after the bound object is created.

nodes.name: NonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder exposing NonLazy / Lazy fluent steps that control whether the binding is instantiated eagerly at container resolution.

nodes.name: NonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: IfNotBoundBinder subclass exposing NonLazy and Lazy to toggle the binding's eager-instantiation flag.

nodes.name: ScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder exposing scope-selection fluent steps (AsCached, AsSingle, AsTransient) that set the binding's instance lifetime scope.

nodes.name: ScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: ConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder subclass exposing AsCached/AsSingle/AsTransient to set the binding's scope and return a deeper binder.

nodes.name: SubContainerBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject fluent binding builder that configures sub-container bindings (by instance, getter, installer, new GameObject, or prefab) and attaches the appropriate finalizer to a bind statement.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of #if NOT_UNITY3D conditional compilation to branch between kernel-scope and Unity default-parent-scope binders.

nodes.name: SubContainerBinder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder exposing ByInstance/ByInstaller/ByNewGameObject*/ByNewPrefab* methods that create sub-container creators and finalizers, returning scope-condition binders for further chaining.

nodes.name: WithKernelDefaultParentScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder variant (Unity default-parent scope) that adds a WithKernel option for sub-container bindings on top of the base scope/condition binder.

nodes.name: WithKernelDefaultParentScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: Binder subclass adding WithKernel() to register a kernel for the sub-container using the Unity default parent scope.

nodes.name: WithKernelScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject binder variant (kernel scope) that adds a WithKernel option for sub-container bindings on top of the base scope/condition binder.

nodes.name: WithKernelScopeConcreteIdArgConditionCopyNonLazyBinder
nodes.summary: Binder subclass adding WithKernel() to register a kernel for the sub-container using an explicit kernel scope.

nodes.name: BindInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject poolable data record holding all configuration for a single binding (contract types, scope, condition, arguments, lifetime flags) with Reset/Dispose for pool reuse.

nodes.name: BindInfo
nodes.summary: Mutable, pool-recycled descriptor of a binding's contract/concrete types, scope, identifier, condition, and arguments; Reset() returns it to a clean state and Dispose() despawns it to ZenPools.

nodes.name: BindStatement.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject poolable binding statement that owns a binding finalizer and disposables, spawns BindInfo from pools, and finalizes the binding into a container.

nodes.name: BindStatement
nodes.summary: Holds the binding finalizer plus tracked disposables; SetFinalizer/FinalizeBinding drive registration and Reset/Dispose recycle the statement through ZenPools.

nodes.name: FactoryBindInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject data holder carrying the factory type, provider factory delegate, and constructor arguments for a factory binding.

nodes.name: FactoryBindInfo
nodes.summary: Stores FactoryType, ProviderFunc, and the argument list used when finalizing a factory binding.

nodes.name: GameObjectCreationParameters.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject value type bundling the parameters used to instantiate a GameObject for a binding (name, group, parent transform/getter, position, rotation) with structural equality.

nodes.name: MemoryPoolBindInfo.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject data holder for memory-pool binding settings (expand method, initial size, max size).

nodes.name: MemoryPoolBindInfo
nodes.summary: Carries ExpandMethod, InitialSize, and MaxSize configuration for a memory-pool binding.

nodes.name: BindingUtil.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject static helper providing binding validation assertions (prefab/GameObject/component/abstract/derives-from checks) and cached provider creation.

nodes.name: BindingUtil
nodes.summary: Static utility with Assert* methods validating types (abstract, derived-from, component, interface, prefab, resource path) and CreateCachedProvider for caching open/closed type providers.

nodes.name: IBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject interface for binding finalizers, exposing FinalizeBinding(container) and the BindingInheritanceMethod property.

nodes.name: IBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: Contract implemented by all binding finalizers: FinalizeBinding registers the binding into the container and BindingInheritanceMethod controls sub-container inheritance.

nodes.name: NullBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject no-op IBindingFinalizer implementation used as a default placeholder that registers nothing.

nodes.name: NullBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: Null-object finalizer whose FinalizeBinding does nothing, serving as the default before a real finalizer is set.

nodes.name: PrefabBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers prefab-based providers, instantiating PrefabInstantiator and PrefabProvider for self and concrete-type bindings.

nodes.name: PrefabResourceBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers providers for prefabs loaded from a Resources path, using PrefabProviderResource and PrefabInstantiator.

nodes.name: ProviderBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject abstract base finalizer providing shared provider-registration logic (per-contract, all-contracts, per-concrete-type) plus bind-type validation against the container.

nodes.name: ProviderBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: Abstract finalizer implementing IBindingFinalizer; RegisterProvider* helpers register providers under contract/concrete identifiers, ValidateBindTypes enforces assignability, and GetScope resolves binding scope.

nodes.name: ScopableBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers scopable providers built from a provider factory for both concrete-type and self bindings.

nodes.name: ScopableBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: ProviderBindingFinalizer subclass that uses a provider factory and BindingUtil.CreateCachedProvider to register cached, scope-aware providers per contract and concrete type.

nodes.name: SingleProviderBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers a single shared provider instance across the binding's contract and concrete types.

nodes.name: SingleProviderBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: ProviderBindingFinalizer subclass that registers one provider built by a provider factory for all contracts or per concrete type.

nodes.name: SubContainerBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers SubContainerDependencyProvider instances using a sub-container creator factory, with optional caching for resolveAll bindings.

nodes.name: SubContainerBindingFinalizer
nodes.summary: ProviderBindingFinalizer subclass that builds sub-container creators (optionally cached) and registers SubContainerDependencyProvider for self and concrete bindings.

nodes.name: SubContainerPrefabBindingFinalizer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject finalizer that registers sub-container providers created from a prefab, wiring SubContainerDependencyProvider via a sub-container creator factory.

nodes.name: ContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject base custom inspector for Context components, providing shared editor behavior reused by the concrete context editors.

nodes.name: GameObjectContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject custom inspector for GameObjectContext, exposing serialized installer properties via EditorGUILayout.

nodes.name: ProjectContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject custom inspector for ProjectContext, rendering its serialized installer and parent-context properties in the Unity inspector.

nodes.name: RunnableContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject custom inspector for RunnableContext, exposing the auto-run serialized property in the inspector.

nodes.name: SceneContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject custom inspector for SceneContext, rendering serialized installer, parent-context, and auto-run properties.

nodes.name: SceneDecoratorContextEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject custom inspector for SceneDecoratorContext, exposing the decorated scene name and installer properties.

nodes.name: EditorStaticInstaller.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject editor-time installer that instantiates and runs an installer through the StaticContext container.

nodes.name: EditorStaticInstaller
nodes.summary: Static helper whose Install<T> instantiates an installer via StaticContext.Container and invokes its InstallBindings.

nodes.name: ZenjectEditorWindow.cs
nodes.summary: Base EditorWindow that hosts a self-contained Zenject DiContainer, wiring a Kernel and GuiRenderableManager so editor tools can render via Zenject lifecycle hooks (OnEnable/Update/OnGUI).
nodes.languageNotes: Bundled Zenject DI library code (vendored under Assets/Plugins), not part of Aspid.MVVM's own source.

nodes.name: ZenjectEditorWindow
nodes.summary: Abstract editor window that builds a DiContainer with a Kernel, installs bindings, resolves roots, then ticks the kernel each Update and renders renderables in OnGUI with fatal-error handling.

nodes.name: ObjectGraphVisualizer.cs
nodes.summary: Editor utility that walks a DiContainer's dependency contracts and emits a DOT-format object graph file for visualizing bindings between types.

nodes.name: ObjectGraphVisualizer
nodes.summary: Static helper that calculates a type-to-dependencies map from a container and serializes it to a Graphviz DOT file, ignoring framework and external types.

nodes.name: OutputObjectGraphToFile
nodes.summary: Computes the container's object graph for the given contract types and writes the resulting DOT representation to the output path.

nodes.name: GetDependencies
nodes.summary: Resolves the list of concrete dependency types a given type requires from the container, expanding factory contracts.

nodes.name: DefaultSceneContractConfig.cs
nodes.summary: ScriptableObject config mapping a resource path to a list of default scene contract names used when auto-loading parent scenes.

nodes.name: DefaultSceneContractConfig
nodes.summary: Serializable ScriptableObject exposing a ResourcePath and the DefaultContracts it provides for scene parent auto-loading.

nodes.name: SceneParentAutomaticLoader.cs
nodes.summary: Editor play-mode hook that validates multi-scene Zenject setups and automatically loads required parent and decorator scenes based on scene contract names before entering play mode.

nodes.name: SceneParentAutomaticLoader
nodes.summary: Static InitializeOnLoad class that registers a play-mode state callback to validate scene parent/decorator contracts and open default scenes for any unfulfilled contracts.

nodes.name: ValidateMultiSceneSetupAndLoadDefaultSceneParents
nodes.summary: Public entry point that loads default contract mappings and processes every loaded Zenject scene to ensure its parent/decorator contracts are satisfied.

nodes.name: LoadDefaultSceneForContract
nodes.summary: Opens the default scene associated with a contract name additively, raising a ZenjectException if no matching default config exists.

nodes.name: TryCreateLoadedSceneInfo
nodes.summary: Builds a LoadedSceneInfo for a scene by locating its SceneContext or DecoratorContext, returning false when the scene has neither.

nodes.name: LoadDefaultContractsMap
nodes.summary: Loads all DefaultSceneContractConfig resources and builds a map from contract name to the resource path that provides it.

nodes.name: UnityInspectorListEditor.cs
nodes.summary: Custom inspector base that renders one or more installer-list arrays as ReorderableLists with labels and descriptions for Zenject context components.

nodes.name: UnityInspectorListEditor
nodes.summary: Abstract Unity Editor that builds ReorderableLists from named serialized installer properties in OnEnable and draws them in OnInspectorGUI.

nodes.name: OnEnable
nodes.summary: Initializes serialized property and ReorderableList collections from the editor's named installer properties, wiring per-element draw callbacks.

nodes.name: Zenject-Editor.asmdef
nodes.summary: Unity assembly definition scoping the Zenject editor-only code into a dedicated Editor assembly that depends on the runtime Zenject assembly.

nodes.name: ZenMenuItems.cs
nodes.summary: Defines Unity menu items and GameObject creation commands for Zenject (Scene/Decorator/GameObject/Project contexts, installers, default contract configs, test templates, and scene validation).

nodes.name: ZenUnityEditorUtil.cs
nodes.summary: Static editor utility collection for Zenject scene validation/running, scene-context discovery, asset/absolute path conversion, and selection-based folder/file resolution in the Project window.

nodes.name: FactoryProviderWrapper.cs
nodes.summary: Adapter that wraps an IProvider as a single-argument IFactory, resolving instances through the provider with type assertions.

nodes.name: FactoryProviderWrapper
nodes.summary: Generic IFactory implementation that delegates Create to an injected IProvider and asserts the produced instance derives from the contract type.

nodes.name: IFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Declares the family of generic IFactory interfaces (zero through ten parameters) plus the non-generic marker, defining the Create contract for Zenject factories.
nodes.languageNotes: Twelve same-named generic IFactory<...> overloads differ only by arity, a common Zenject pattern for variadic factory signatures.

nodes.name: KeyedFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Factory that maps user-supplied keys to concrete types and instantiates the matching type via the container, with arity overloads for passing extra constructor parameters.

nodes.name: KeyedFactoryBase
nodes.summary: Base class building a key-to-type map from injected type pairs, validating for duplicates and resolving the concrete type (with fallback) for a given key.

nodes.name: Initialize
nodes.summary: Validates the fallback type, detects duplicate keys, and builds the immutable key-to-type dictionary from the injected type pairs.

nodes.name: GetTypeForKey
nodes.summary: Returns the concrete type registered for a key, falling back to the configured fallback type and asserting a non-null result.

nodes.name: KeyedFactory
nodes.summary: Generic keyed factory overloads that resolve a type by key and instantiate it through the container, forwarding zero to four extra constructor parameters.

nodes.name: PlaceholderFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Family of generic PlaceholderFactory / Factory classes (zero through ten parameters) that defer instance construction to a provider configured at bind time via CreateInternal.
nodes.languageNotes: Each arity packs its Create arguments into TypeValuePair lists via InjectUtil.CreateTypePair before delegating to CreateInternal in the base.

nodes.name: PlaceholderFactory
nodes.summary: Generic placeholder factory whose Create builds a TypeValuePair argument list and delegates to the base CreateInternal to produce the contract instance.

nodes.name: PlaceholderFactoryBase.cs
nodes.summary: Base class for placeholder factories that holds the injected provider and inject context, instantiates the contract via the provider in CreateInternal, and supports validation.

nodes.name: PlaceholderFactoryBase
nodes.summary: Abstract generic factory base storing provider/inject context, producing instances via CreateInternal with type-derivation assertions and wrapping failures in ZenjectException.

nodes.name: CreateInternal
nodes.summary: Resolves an instance from the provider with the supplied extra args, asserts the result type derives from the value type, and wraps any construction error in a ZenjectException.

nodes.name: IMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Declares the memory-pool interface hierarchy: a base IMemoryPool with size/resize/despawn members, IDespawnableMemoryPool, and generic Spawn overloads for zero through nine spawn parameters.
nodes.languageNotes: Same-named generic IMemoryPool<...> declarations differ only by Spawn arity, the standard Zenject variadic-pool pattern.

nodes.name: MemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Concrete memory-pool overloads (zero through eight parameters) that spawn an item from the pool, reinitialize it with the supplied arguments under profiling, and expose IFactory-style Create.
nodes.languageNotes: Each Spawn calls GetInternal, profiles the Reinitialize call via ProfileBlock, and the abstract Reinitialize is overridden per concrete pool.

nodes.name: MemoryPool
nodes.summary: Generic memory pool whose Spawn pulls an inactive item, profiles and invokes Reinitialize with the spawn parameters, and whose Create satisfies the IFactory contract.

nodes.name: Spawn
nodes.summary: Acquires an item via GetInternal then reinitializes it inside a profiled block keyed on the concrete pool type before returning it to the caller.

nodes.name: MemoryPoolBase.cs
nodes.summary: Core pool implementation managing the inactive-item stack, factory-backed allocation, resize/expand/shrink policies, despawn bookkeeping, and the MemoryPoolSettings + PoolExceededFixedSizeException types.

nodes.name: MemoryPoolBase
nodes.summary: Abstract generic pool tracking active/inactive counts, allocating via an injected factory, resizing per the configured expand method, and exposing OnCreated/OnSpawned/OnDespawned/OnDestroyed hooks.

nodes.name: MemoryPoolSettings
nodes.summary: Value type holding pool configuration (initial size, max size, expand method) with a Default instance for unbounded one-at-a-time expansion.

nodes.name: Resize
nodes.summary: Grows or shrinks the inactive-item stack to the desired pool size, allocating new items or destroying surplus ones, and rejects resizing fixed-size pools.

nodes.name: ExpandPool
nodes.summary: Grows the pool according to the configured expand method (fixed/1/double), throwing when a fixed-size pool is exceeded.

nodes.name: Despawn
nodes.summary: Returns an item to the inactive stack with double-despawn assertion, runs the profiled OnDespawned hook, and resizes when the pool grows beyond the spawn-on-demand threshold.

nodes.name: AllocNew
nodes.summary: Creates a fresh item through the injected factory, runs the OnCreated hook, and wraps construction failures in a ZenjectException.

nodes.name: MonoMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: MonoBehaviour-aware memory pool overloads that toggle GameObject active state and reparent on spawn/despawn, and destroy the GameObject when items are removed from the pool.

nodes.name: MonoMemoryPool
nodes.summary: Generic pool for MonoBehaviour items overriding the lifecycle hooks to activate on create/spawn, deactivate and reparent on despawn, and destroy the GameObject on removal.

nodes.name: MonoPoolableMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: MonoBehaviour pool overloads for items implementing IPoolable: forwards OnSpawned/OnDespawned to the item alongside GameObject activation and reparenting, across zero-to-eight reinitialize parameters.

nodes.name: MonoPoolableMemoryPool
nodes.summary: Generic MonoBehaviour pool that activates/deactivates and reparents pooled GameObjects while delegating spawn/despawn notifications to the poolable item itself.

nodes.name: PoolableMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Memory-pool overloads for plain IPoolable items that forward OnDespawned and Reinitialize (OnSpawned) calls to the item across zero-to-eight reinitialize parameters.

nodes.name: PoolableMemoryPool
nodes.summary: Generic pool that relays lifecycle notifications to IPoolable items, invoking item.OnSpawned on reinitialize and item.OnDespawned when returned to the pool.

nodes.name: PoolFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Adapter factories (zero- and one-argument) that wrap a memory pool so that calling Create simply spawns an item from the underlying pool.

nodes.name: PoolWrapperFactory
nodes.summary: Generic IFactory implementation holding a memory pool and producing instances by spawning from that pool on Create.

nodes.name: PoolableStaticMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Static (non-container) memory-pool overloads for IPoolable items that forward OnSpawned/OnDespawned to the item, supporting zero through several spawn parameters.

nodes.name: PoolableStaticMemoryPool
nodes.summary: Generic static pool relaying spawn/despawn lifecycle to IPoolable values without requiring a DiContainer.

nodes.name: StaticMemoryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Container-free static memory pool core managing an item stack with resize/expand/shrink, spawn/despawn via delegate callbacks, and generic arity overloads for parameterized spawning.

nodes.name: StaticMemoryPoolBaseBase
nodes.summary: Abstract static-pool base maintaining the inactive item stack, active count, and resize/clear/shrink/expand logic with delegate-driven onDespawned callbacks.

nodes.name: ResizeInternal
nodes.summary: Adjusts the inactive item stack to a desired size by allocating new items or popping surplus ones.

nodes.name: SpawnInternal
nodes.summary: Pops an inactive item (expanding the pool when empty), increments the active count, and returns the item for caller reinitialization.

nodes.name: Despawn
nodes.summary: Returns an element to the inactive stack, invokes the onDespawned callback, and decrements the active count.

nodes.name: ArrayPool.cs
nodes.summary: Utility pool of reusable arrays keyed by length, providing per-length StaticMemoryPool instances to avoid repeated array allocations.

nodes.name: ArrayPool
nodes.summary: Generic static cache of length-specific array pools that hands out and recycles arrays of a requested size.

nodes.name: DictionaryPool.cs
nodes.summary: Utility singleton pool of reusable Dictionary instances built on a StaticMemoryPool, clearing dictionaries on despawn.

nodes.name: DictionaryPool
nodes.summary: Generic singleton pool that spawns and recycles cleared Dictionary instances to minimize allocations.

nodes.name: HashSetPool.cs
nodes.summary: Utility singleton pool of reusable HashSet instances built on a StaticMemoryPool, clearing sets on despawn.

nodes.name: HashSetPool
nodes.summary: Generic singleton pool that spawns and recycles cleared HashSet instances to minimize allocations.

nodes.name: ListPool.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject utility providing a static singleton object pool for reusable List<T> instances, clearing each list on despawn to avoid allocations.

nodes.name: ListPool
nodes.summary: Static-instance memory pool of List<T> objects that clears each list when it is despawned back into the pool.

nodes.name: PoolCleanupChecker.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject diagnostic that, on late dispose, asserts every memory pool has all objects despawned, flagging pools where objects were leaked.

nodes.name: PoolCleanupChecker
nodes.summary: Late-disposable checker that verifies all non-ignored memory pools have zero active (un-despawned) objects when the container tears down.

nodes.name: StaticMemoryPoolRegistry.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject static registry that tracks all live memory pools and raises PoolAdded/PoolRemoved events as pools are created and destroyed.

nodes.name: StaticMemoryPoolRegistry
nodes.summary: Static class holding the global list of active IMemoryPool instances, exposing Add/Remove plus PoolAdded/PoolRemoved notification events.

nodes.name: PrefabFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject factory family that instantiates a Unity prefab and injects the requested component, supporting zero to four explicit construction parameters.
nodes.languageNotes: Provides five generic arity overloads (T, P1..P4) of the same factory pattern, each implementing the corresponding IFactory<UnityEngine.Object,...> interface.

nodes.name: PrefabFactory<T>
nodes.summary: Factory that instantiates a given prefab via the DiContainer and returns its injected component of type T.

nodes.name: PrefabResourceFactory.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject factory family that loads a prefab from a Resources path, instantiates it and injects the requested component, with zero to four explicit parameters.
nodes.languageNotes: Mirrors PrefabFactory but resolves the prefab through Resources.Load using a string path argument.

nodes.name: PrefabResourceFactory<T>
nodes.summary: Factory that loads a prefab by Resources path, instantiates it through the container and returns its injected component of type T.

nodes.name: InjectContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject pooled context object carrying all metadata for a single dependency resolution request (member type, identifier, parent chain, container) and supporting sub-context creation and cloning.

nodes.name: InjectContext
nodes.summary: Disposable, pool-managed descriptor of a resolution request exposing the member type, identifier, optional flag, parent-context chain and container, with helpers to derive sub-contexts, clone, and render the object graph.

nodes.name: CreateSubContext
nodes.summary: Spawns a child InjectContext for resolving a nested member type, linking it to the current context as its parent.

nodes.name: GetObjectGraphString
nodes.summary: Builds an indented, human-readable representation of the parent-context chain for diagnostics and error messages.

nodes.name: InjectUtil.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject static helper that builds TypeValuePair argument lists for explicit injection and pops matching typed values out of an extra-args map during construction.
nodes.languageNotes: Provides six CreateArgListExplicit overloads (one to six params) that pair each argument with its runtime type.

nodes.name: InjectUtil
nodes.summary: Static utility converting raw argument values into typed TypeValuePair lists and extracting a value of a requested type from a list of extra injection arguments.

nodes.name: PopValueWithType
nodes.summary: Finds and removes the first extra argument assignable to the injected field type, returning whether a match was found and its value.

nodes.name: LazyInject.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject LazyInject<T> wrapper that defers resolving a dependency from the container until its Value is first accessed.

nodes.name: LazyInject
nodes.summary: Holds a container and inject context, resolving and caching the underlying value of type T on first access to its Value property.

nodes.name: Context.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject abstract MonoBehaviour base for all installation contexts, managing the installer collections and driving the install of normal, prefab, ScriptableObject installers plus scene ZenjectBindings.

nodes.name: Context
nodes.summary: Abstract MonoBehaviour root of the context hierarchy that aggregates installers and ZenjectBindings and runs the installation pipeline into a DiContainer.

nodes.name: GameObjectContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject context that creates a sub-container scoped to a single GameObject and its child injectable MonoBehaviours, wiring up a MonoKernel for lifecycle ticking.

nodes.name: GameObjectContext
nodes.summary: Runnable context that installs bindings into a child sub-container for the GameObject subtree and resolves/starts a DefaultGameObjectKernel.

nodes.name: ProjectContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject singleton context loaded from a Resources prefab that builds the application-wide root container surviving scene loads via DontDestroyOnLoad.

nodes.name: ProjectContext
nodes.summary: Lazily instantiated global context that loads its prefab from Resources, builds the root DiContainer, binds project-level services and persists across scenes.

nodes.name: RunnableContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject abstract context adding optional auto-run-on-Awake gating so subclasses can be initialized manually or on startup.

nodes.name: RunnableContext
nodes.summary: Abstract Context subclass guarding a single Run() of the install/resolve pipeline behind an auto-run flag and providing a component-creation helper.

nodes.name: SceneContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject per-scene context that builds a scene-scoped container parented to matching contracts, applies decorator contexts and resolves a SceneKernel.

nodes.name: SceneContext
nodes.summary: Runnable context for a Unity scene that locates parent containers by contract name, runs decorator contexts, installs scene bindings and resolves/starts the scene kernel.

nodes.name: GetParentContainers
nodes.summary: Resolves the parent DiContainers for this scene by scanning loaded scenes for SceneContexts whose contract names match the configured parent contracts.

nodes.name: SceneDecoratorContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject context that decorates another scene's container by name, contributing extra bindings and installers without owning its own container.

nodes.name: SceneDecoratorContext
nodes.summary: Context that injects additional scene bindings and installers into a decorated scene container identified by a contract name.

nodes.name: StaticContext.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject static holder exposing a lazily created application-global DiContainer used as the ultimate parent of all other containers.

nodes.name: StaticContext
nodes.summary: Static class providing a lazily instantiated process-wide DiContainer plus a clear helper for test teardown.

nodes.name: IInstaller.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject interface defining the installer contract: an InstallBindings method plus an IsEnabled flag.

nodes.name: IInstaller
nodes.summary: Interface contract for all Zenject installers, declaring InstallBindings() and an IsEnabled property.

nodes.name: Installer.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject generic Installer base family adding static Install helpers that instantiate a derived installer through the container with zero to five explicit parameters.
nodes.languageNotes: Seven generic arities of the same Installer<TDerived,...> pattern, each exposing a static Install(container, params) that self-instantiates and calls InstallBindings.

nodes.name: Installer<TDerived>
nodes.summary: Generic abstract installer base providing a static Install helper that instantiates the derived installer via the container and runs its bindings.

nodes.name: InstallerBase.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject abstract base implementing IInstaller for plain (non-Unity) installers, exposing the injected Container and an abstract InstallBindings.

nodes.name: InstallerBase
nodes.summary: Abstract IInstaller implementation holding the injected DiContainer and declaring the abstract InstallBindings hook.

nodes.name: MonoInstaller.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject MonoBehaviour installer base family plus a MonoInstallerUtil helper that loads and instantiates installer prefabs from Resources for explicit-arg installation.
nodes.languageNotes: Seven generic arities of MonoInstaller share InstallFromResource overloads backed by the static MonoInstallerUtil.

nodes.name: MonoInstaller
nodes.summary: Non-generic MonoBehaviour installer base used as a concrete entry point and parent for the generic InstallFromResource variants.

nodes.name: MonoInstallerUtil
nodes.summary: Static helper that derives default Resources paths and instantiates MonoInstaller prefabs as parented, injectable components.

nodes.name: MonoInstallerBase.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject MonoBehaviour base that implements IInstaller, exposing the injected Container and a default-throwing InstallBindings for subclasses to override.

nodes.name: MonoInstallerBase
nodes.summary: MonoBehaviour implementing IInstaller with an injected Container and a virtual InstallBindings that throws until overridden.

nodes.name: ScriptableObjectInstaller.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject ScriptableObject installer base family plus a utility that loads installer ScriptableObjects from Resources for explicit-arg installation.
nodes.languageNotes: Six generic arities of ScriptableObjectInstaller share InstallFromResource overloads backed by the static ScriptableObjectInstallerUtil.

nodes.name: ScriptableObjectInstaller
nodes.summary: Non-generic ScriptableObject installer base used as a concrete entry point and parent for the generic InstallFromResource variants.

nodes.name: ScriptableObjectInstallerUtil
nodes.summary: Static helper that derives default Resources paths and loads installer ScriptableObjects from those paths with assertion checks.

nodes.name: ScriptableObjectInstallerBase.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject ScriptableObject base implementing IInstaller, exposing the injected Container and a default-throwing InstallBindings for subclasses to override.

nodes.name: ScriptableObjectInstallerBase
nodes.summary: ScriptableObject implementing IInstaller with an injected Container and a virtual InstallBindings that throws until overridden.

nodes.name: ZenjectBinding.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject MonoBehaviour component that, attached in a scene, declares one or more components to be auto-bound into the context's container by self/base/all-interfaces type.

nodes.name: ZenjectBinding
nodes.summary: Scene component exposing inspector fields (components, identifier, BindTypes) that the enclosing context reads to register those components into its container.

nodes.name: ZenjectManagersInstaller.cs
nodes.summary: Vendored Zenject installer that binds the core lifecycle managers (TickableManager, InitializableManager, DisposableManager) as singletons copied into all sub-containers.

nodes.name: ZenjectManagersInstaller
nodes.summary: Installer binding TickableManager, InitializableManager and DisposableManager as singletons propagated into every sub-container.

nodes.name: Assert.cs

nodes.name: LinqExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Internal LINQ-style extension methods (Yield, OnlyOrDefault, HasAtLeast/HasMoreThan, GetDuplicates, etc.) used throughout the Zenject container for concise, allocation-aware collection queries.

nodes.summary: Internal logging facade routing Debug/Info/Warn/Trace/Error messages to UnityEngine.Debug (or Console outside Unity), with format-string helpers.

nodes.name: MiscExtensions.cs
nodes.summary: Assorted internal extension helpers (string Fmt formatting, IndexOf, allocation-free AddRange, RemoveWithConfirm, GetValueAndRemove) supporting the container internals.

nodes.name: DiContainer.cs
